            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}
</file>

<file path="app/templates/admin/pos/_pos_modals.html">
{# =================================================================
   templates/admin/pos/_pos_modals.html
   Partial chứa toàn bộ modal overlay của POS Terminal.
   Được include bởi pos_terminal.html — không dùng độc lập.

   Gồm 4 modal:
     1. #variantModal       — chọn màu/size trước khi thêm giỏ
     2. #transferWaitModal  — chờ xác nhận chuyển khoản (Casso)
     3. #barcodeCameraModal — quét mã vạch qua camera (QuaggaJS)
     4. #posToast           — thông báo nhanh góc trên
================================================================= #}

{# ── 1. MODAL CHỌN BIẾN THỂ (màu / size) ── #}
<div id="variantModal"
  class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm z-[200] hidden items-center justify-center p-4">
  <div class="bg-white rounded-sm shadow-2xl w-full max-w-lg overflow-hidden" id="variantModalContent">

    {# Header: ảnh + tên + giá sản phẩm #}
    <div class="p-5 border-b border-neutral-100 flex items-start gap-4">
      <div class="w-16 h-20 bg-[#f8f8f8] rounded-sm border border-neutral-200 overflow-hidden flex-shrink-0"
        id="vmImage"></div>
      <div class="flex-1 min-w-0 pr-2 pt-1">
        <h3 class="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-black line-clamp-2 leading-snug"
          id="vmTitle">Tên sản phẩm</h3>
        <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-neutral-500 mt-1" id="vmPrice">0đ</p>
      </div>
      <button onclick="POS.closeVariantModal()"
        class="text-neutral-400 hover:text-black p-1 bg-neutral-50 rounded-sm">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-xmark text-lg"></i>
      </button>
    </div>

    {# Body: list màu + list size (render bởi JS) #}
    <div class="p-5 max-h-[50vh] overflow-y-auto no-scrollbar bg-[#f8f8f8]" id="vmOptions"></div>
  </div>
</div>


{# ── 2. MODAL CHỜ XÁC NHẬN CHUYỂN KHOẢN (Casso webhook) ── #}
<div id="transferWaitModal"
  class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-sm z-[300] hidden items-center justify-center p-4">
  <div class="bg-white rounded-sm shadow-2xl w-full max-w-sm p-8 text-center space-y-4">

    {# Icon trạng thái: spin → check khi paid #}
    <div id="twIcon" class="text-5xl text-neutral-300">
      <i class="fa-solid fa-rotate spin"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-black" id="twTitle">
      Đang chờ thanh toán...
    </p>
    <p class="text-[10px] text-neutral-500" id="twSub">
      Hệ thống sẽ tự động xác nhận khi nhận được tiền
    </p>

    {# Nút hành động — ẩn cho đến khi paid #}
    <div id="twActions" class="hidden flex-col gap-2">
      <button onclick="POS.printReceiptFromModal()"
        class="w-full py-3 bg-black text-white text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded-sm hover:bg-neutral-800 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-print"></i> In Hóa Đơn
      </button>
      <button onclick="POS.closeTransferModal()"
        class="w-full py-3 border border-neutral-200 text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded-sm hover:bg-neutral-50 transition-colors">
        Đóng
      </button>
    </div>

    {# Nút hủy chờ — ẩn khi đã paid #}
    <button onclick="POS.cancelTransferWait()" id="twCancelBtn"
      class="text-[10px] text-neutral-400 hover:text-black underline underline-offset-2">
      Hủy chờ
    </button>
  </div>
</div>


{# ── 3. MODAL CAMERA BARCODE SCANNER (QuaggaJS) ── #}
<div id="barcodeCameraModal"
  class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm z-[350] hidden items-center justify-center p-4">
  <div class="bg-white rounded-sm shadow-2xl w-full max-w-sm overflow-hidden">

    {# Header #}
    <div class="px-5 py-4 border-b border-neutral-100 flex items-center justify-between">
      <div>
        <p class="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-black">Quét Mã Vạch</p>
        <p class="text-[9px] text-neutral-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest mt-0.5">
          Đưa barcode vào khung hình
        </p>
      </div>
      <button onclick="POS.closeCameraScanner()"
        class="text-neutral-400 hover:text-black p-1 bg-neutral-50 rounded-sm">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-xmark text-lg"></i>
      </button>
    </div>

    {# Viewport camera + laser animation #}
    <div class="p-4">
      <div class="relative bg-black rounded-sm overflow-hidden" style="height:240px;">
        <div id="interactive" class="viewport"></div>
        <div class="laser"></div>
      </div>
      <p id="bcScanResult"
        class="mt-3 text-center text-[10px] font-bold text-neutral-500 uppercase tracking-widest">
        Đang khởi động camera...
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


{# ── 4. TOAST THÔNG BÁO NHANH ── #}
<div id="posToast"
  class="fixed top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-[400] hidden items-center gap-3 px-6 py-4 border text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest shadow-2xl bg-white rounded-sm">
  <i id="posToastIcon" class="fa-solid text-base"></i>
  <span id="posToastMsg"></span>
</div>
</file>

<file path="app/templates/admin/pos/_pos_scripts.html">
{# =================================================================
   templates/admin/pos/_pos_scripts.html
   Partial chứa toàn bộ JavaScript của POS Terminal.
   Được include bởi pos_terminal.html (sau thẻ products-data).
   Yêu cầu QuaggaJS đã load trong extra_head.

   Cấu trúc object POS:
     INIT        — init(), _initUsbScanner()
     BARCODE     — _handleBarcodeResult(), openCameraScanner(), closeCameraScanner()
     UI UTILS    — fmt(), renderThumb(), showToast()
     PAYMENT     — setMethod(), _updateTransferQR()
     SEARCH      — filterProducts(), clearSearch()
     PRODUCTS    — renderQuickGrid(), handleSelect()
     VARIANTS    — openVariantModal(), confirmVariant(), closeVariantModal()
     CART        — addToCart(), updateQty(), renderCart()
     TOTALS      — calcTotal(), calcChange()
     CHECKOUT    — submit()
     TRANSFER    — openTransferModal(), startPolling(), onTransferConfirmed()
                   printReceiptFromModal(), cancelTransferWait(), closeTransferModal()
     RESET       — resetCart()
     PRINT       — printReceipt()
================================================================= #}
<script>
const POS = {
  db:     [],
  cart:   [],
  method: 'cash',               // 'cash' | 'transfer'
  currentProductForVariant: null,
  _pollTimer:      null,
  _pendingInvoice: null,

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  //  INIT
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  init() {
    try {
      this.db = JSON.parse(document.getElementById('products-data').textContent) || [];
    } catch(e) {}
    this.renderQuickGrid();
    // Đóng dropdown khi click ngoài vùng search
    document.addEventListener('click', e => {
      if (!document.getElementById('searchWrapper').contains(e.target))
        document.getElementById('posDropdown').classList.add('hidden');
    });
    // Live-format ô tiền mặt: tự thêm dấu chấm khi nhập
    const inputCash = document.getElementById('inputCash');
    if (inputCash) {
      inputCash.addEventListener('input', () => {
        const raw     = inputCash.value;
        const digits  = raw.replace(/[^\d]/g, '');   // chỉ giữ số
        const formatted = digits
          ? Number(digits).toLocaleString('vi-VN').replace(/,/g, '.')
          : '';
        // Gán lại giá trị đã format (tránh vòng lặp vô hạn bằng cách so sánh)
        if (inputCash.value !== formatted) {
          inputCash.value = formatted;
        }
        POS.calcChange();
      });
    }
    this._initUsbScanner();
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  //  BARCODE — USB SCANNER
  //  USB scanner hoạt động như bàn phím gõ cực nhanh (< 80ms/ký tự)
  //  rồi gửi Enter → buffer lại → xử lý khi nhận Enter
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  _usbBuffer: '',
  _usbTimer:  null,

  _initUsbScanner() {
    document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
      const tag  = document.activeElement.tagName;
      const type = document.activeElement.type;

      // Nếu đang focus input text, chỉ xử lý Enter tại ô posSearch
      if (tag === 'INPUT' && type !== 'number') {
        if (e.key === 'Enter' && document.activeElement.id === 'posSearch') {
          e.preventDefault();
          const kw = document.getElementById('posSearch').value.trim();
          if (kw) this._handleBarcodeResult(kw);
        }
        return;
      }

      // Ngoài input: buffer ký tự từ scanner
      if (e.key === 'Enter') {
        if (this._usbBuffer.length >= 3) this._handleBarcodeResult(this._usbBuffer);
        this._usbBuffer = '';
        clearTimeout(this._usbTimer);
        return;
      }
      if (e.key.length === 1) {
        this._usbBuffer += e.key;
        clearTimeout(this._usbTimer);
        // Reset buffer nếu ngừng nhập > 80ms (gõ tay chậm hơn scanner)
        this._usbTimer = setTimeout(() => { this._usbBuffer = ''; }, 80);
      }
    });
  },

  _handleBarcodeResult(code) {
    code = code.trim();
    const p = this.db.find(x =>
      x.id      === code ||
      x.barcode === code ||
      x.sku     === code ||
      x.name.toLowerCase() === code.toLowerCase()
    );
    if (p) {
      const searchBox = document.getElementById('posSearch');
      searchBox.classList.add('scan-flash');
      setTimeout(() => searchBox.classList.remove('scan-flash'), 400);
      this.showToast(`✓ Quét: ${p.name}`, true);
      this.handleSelect(p.id);
    } else {
      // Fallback: đổ vào ô search để nhân viên xử lý thủ công
      document.getElementById('posSearch').value = code;
      this.filterProducts();
      this.showToast(`Mã "${code}" — chọn thủ công`, false);
    }
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  //  BARCODE — CAMERA SCANNER (QuaggaJS)
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  _cameraActive: false,

  openCameraScanner() {
    const modal = document.getElementById('barcodeCameraModal');
    modal.classList.remove('hidden'); modal.classList.add('flex');
    document.getElementById('bcScanResult').textContent = 'Đang khởi động camera...';

    Quagga.init({
      inputStream: {
        name: 'Live',
        type: 'LiveStream',
        target: document.querySelector('#interactive'),
        constraints: { facingMode: 'environment', width: 640, height: 480 }
      },
      decoder: {
        readers: [
          'ean_reader', 'ean_8_reader', 'code_128_reader',
          'code_39_reader', 'upc_reader', 'upc_e_reader', 'i2of5_reader'
        ]
      },
      locate: true
    }, err => {
      if (err) {
        document.getElementById('bcScanResult').textContent = 'Không thể mở camera: ' + err.message;
        return;
      }
      Quagga.start();
      this._cameraActive = true;
      document.getElementById('bcScanResult').textContent = 'Đưa mã vạch vào khung hình...';
    });

    Quagga.onDetected(result => {
      const code = result.codeResult?.code;
      if (!code) return;
      Quagga.offDetected();
      document.getElementById('bcScanResult').textContent = `✓ Nhận mã: ${code}`;
      setTimeout(() => {
        this.closeCameraScanner();
        this._handleBarcodeResult(code);
      }, 500);
    });
  },

  closeCameraScanner() {
    if (this._cameraActive) {
      try { Quagga.stop(); } catch(e) {}
      this._cameraActive = false;
    }
    const modal = document.getElementById('barcodeCameraModal');
    modal.classList.add('hidden'); modal.classList.remove('flex');
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  //  UI UTILS
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  fmt: n => Number(n || 0).toLocaleString('vi-VN') + ' ₫',

  /**
   * Định dạng số thành chuỗi có dấu chấm phân cách hàng nghìn (VN style).
   * VD: 500000 → "500.000"
   * Dùng cho hiển thị trong input text (không kèm " ₫").
   */
  fmtInput(n) {
    const num = parseInt(String(n).replace(/\./g, '').replace(/[^\d]/g, ''), 10);
    if (isNaN(num)) return '';
    return num.toLocaleString('vi-VN').replace(/,/g, '.');
  },

  /**
   * Parse chuỗi tiền từ ô input về số nguyên.
   * Xử lý mọi trường hợp: "500.000", "500000", "500,000", "500 000".
   * BẮT BUỘC xóa tất cả ký tự không phải chữ số trước khi parseInt.
   */
  parseInputMoney(raw) {
    if (!raw) return 0;
    // Xóa dấu chấm, dấu phẩy, khoảng trắng, ký tự ₫ — giữ lại chỉ chữ số
    const cleaned = String(raw).replace(/[^\d]/g, '');
    const parsed  = parseInt(cleaned, 10);
    return isNaN(parsed) ? 0 : parsed;
  },

  renderThumb(url, large = false) {
    if (url) return `<img src="${url}" class="w-full h-full object-cover object-top mix-blend-multiply ${large ? 'group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-[1500ms]' : ''}">`;
    return `<div class="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center text-neutral-300 bg-neutral-50">
              <i class="fa-solid fa-image ${large ? 'text-2xl' : 'text-sm'}"></i>
            </div>`;
  },

  showToast(msg, ok) {
    const t = document.getElementById('posToast');
    t.className = `fixed top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-[400] flex items-center gap-3 px-6 py-4 border text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest shadow-2xl bg-white rounded-sm ${ok ? 'border-emerald-500 text-emerald-600' : 'border-red-500 text-red-600'}`;
    document.getElementById('posToastIcon').className = `fa-solid ${ok ? 'fa-check' : 'fa-xmark'}`;
    document.getElementById('posToastMsg').textContent = msg;
    t.classList.remove('hidden');
    setTimeout(() => t.classList.add('hidden'), 2800);
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  //  PAYMENT METHOD
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  setMethod(m) {
    this.method = m;
    const isCash = m === 'cash';
    const activeClass   = 'border-black bg-black text-white';
    const inactiveClass = 'border-neutral-200 bg-white text-neutral-500 hover:border-neutral-400';
    const base = 'flex flex-col items-center gap-1.5 py-3 border-2 rounded-sm transition-all text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest';
    document.getElementById('btnCash').className     = `${base} ${isCash  ? activeClass : inactiveClass}`;
    document.getElementById('btnTransfer').className = `${base} ${!isCash ? activeClass : inactiveClass}`;
    document.getElementById('cashPanel').classList.toggle('hidden', !isCash);
    document.getElementById('transferPanel').classList.toggle('hidden', isCash);
    this.calcChange();
    if (!isCash) this._updateTransferQR();
  },

  _updateTransferQR() {
    const total   = parseFloat(document.getElementById('txtTotal').textContent.replace(/[^\d]/g, '')) || 0;
    const addInfo = encodeURIComponent('GUA MAISON');
    document.getElementById('transferQR').src =
      `https://img.vietqr.io/image/TCB-4890440016335294-compact2.png?amount=${total}&addInfo=${addInfo}&accountName=GUA+MAISON`;
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  //  SEARCH
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  filterProducts() {
    const kw = document.getElementById('posSearch').value.toLowerCase().trim();
    const dd = document.getElementById('posDropdown');
    document.getElementById('posClearSearch').classList.toggle('hidden', !kw);
    if (!kw) { dd.classList.add('hidden'); return; }

    const res = this.db.filter(p =>
      p.name.toLowerCase().includes(kw) || p.id.includes(kw)
    ).slice(0, 15);

    dd.innerHTML = res.length
      ? res.map(p => {
          const stock = p.product_variants
            ? p.product_variants.reduce((s, v) => s + (v.stock || 0), 0)
            : (p.stock || 0);
          return `<div onclick="POS.handleSelect('${p.id}')"
            class="flex items-center gap-4 p-3 border-b border-neutral-100 cursor-pointer hover:bg-neutral-50 ${stock <= 0 ? 'opacity-40' : ''}">
            <div class="w-12 h-16 bg-[#f8f8f8] rounded-sm overflow-hidden flex-shrink-0 border border-neutral-200">${this.renderThumb(p.thumbnail_url)}</div>
            <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
              <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-black uppercase truncate">${p.name}</p>
              <p class="text-[10px] font-medium text-neutral-500 mt-1">${this.fmt(p.price)}</p>
            </div>
            ${stock <= 0
              ? `<span class="text-[9px] text-red-500 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-2 py-1 bg-red-50 rounded-sm">Hết</span>`
              : `<span class="text-[9px] text-neutral-500 font-bold">${stock} kho</span>`}
          </div>`;
        }).join('')
      : `<div class="p-5 text-center text-[10px] font-bold text-neutral-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Không tìm thấy</div>`;

    dd.classList.remove('hidden');
  },

  clearSearch() {
    document.getElementById('posSearch').value = '';
    document.getElementById('posClearSearch').classList.add('hidden');
    document.getElementById('posDropdown').classList.add('hidden');
    document.getElementById('posSearch').focus();
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  //  PRODUCTS
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  renderQuickGrid() {
    document.getElementById('quickProductsGrid').innerHTML = this.db.slice(0, 16).map(p => `
      <div onclick="POS.handleSelect('${p.id}')"
        class="bg-white border border-neutral-200 cursor-pointer hover:border-black transition-all rounded-sm flex flex-col group overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-md">
        <div class="aspect-[3/4] bg-[#f8f8f8] relative overflow-hidden border-b border-neutral-200">
          ${this.renderThumb(p.thumbnail_url, true)}
          ${(p.stock || 0) <= 0 && !(p.product_variants?.length)
            ? `<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-white/60 flex items-center justify-center">
                <span class="bg-black text-white text-[9px] font-bold px-2 py-1 uppercase tracking-widest">Hết hàng</span>
               </div>` : ''}
        </div>
        <div class="p-3 flex-1 bg-white">
          <p class="text-[10px] font-bold text-black uppercase line-clamp-2 leading-snug">${p.name}</p>
          <p class="text-[11px] font-black text-black mt-1.5 tabular-nums">${this.fmt(p.price)}</p>
        </div>
      </div>`).join('');
  },

  handleSelect(id) {
    const p = this.db.find(x => x.id === id);
    if (!p) return;
    document.getElementById('posDropdown').classList.add('hidden');
    document.getElementById('posSearch').value = '';
    document.getElementById('posClearSearch').classList.add('hidden');

    if (p.product_variants?.length) { this.openVariantModal(p); return; }
    if ((p.stock || 0) <= 0) { this.showToast('Sản phẩm đã hết hàng', false); return; }
    this.addToCart(p, null, p.price);
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  //  VARIANTS
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  _selColor: null,
  _selSize:  null,

  openVariantModal(p) {
    this.currentProductForVariant = p;
    document.getElementById('vmTitle').textContent = p.name;
    document.getElementById('vmPrice').textContent = this.fmt(p.price);
    document.getElementById('vmImage').innerHTML   = this.renderThumb(p.thumbnail_url);

    const colors = [...new Set(p.product_variants.map(v => v.color_name).filter(Boolean))];
    const sizes  = [...new Set(p.product_variants.map(v => v.size).filter(Boolean))];

    document.getElementById('vmOptions').innerHTML = `
      ${colors.length ? `
        <div class="mb-4">
          <p class="text-[9px] font-bold text-neutral-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">Màu sắc</p>
          <div class="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
            ${colors.map(c => {
              const v = p.product_variants.find(x => x.color_name === c);
              return `<button
                onclick="document.querySelectorAll('.vm-color').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('border-black','bg-black','text-white'));this.classList.add('border-black','bg-black','text-white');POS._selColor='${c}'"
                class="vm-color text-[10px] font-bold px-3 py-1.5 border border-neutral-300 rounded-sm hover:border-black uppercase tracking-widest transition-all flex items-center gap-1.5">
                ${v?.color_hex ? `<span class="w-3 h-3 rounded-full inline-block border border-white/40" style="background:${v.color_hex}"></span>` : ''}${c}
              </button>`;
            }).join('')}
          </div>
        </div>` : ''}
      ${sizes.length ? `
        <div class="mb-4">
          <p class="text-[9px] font-bold text-neutral-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">Size</p>
          <div class="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
            ${sizes.map(s => `
              <button
                onclick="document.querySelectorAll('.vm-size').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('border-black','bg-black','text-white'));this.classList.add('border-black','bg-black','text-white');POS._selSize='${s}'"
                class="vm-size w-10 h-10 text-[11px] font-bold border border-neutral-300 rounded-sm hover:border-black transition-all uppercase">${s}
              </button>`).join('')}
          </div>
        </div>` : ''}
      <button onclick="POS.confirmVariant()"
        class="w-full py-3 bg-black text-white text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded-sm hover:bg-neutral-800 transition-colors mt-2">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-plus mr-2"></i>Thêm vào giỏ
      </button>`;

    this._selColor = colors[0] || null;
    this._selSize  = sizes[0]  || null;
    const modal = document.getElementById('variantModal');
    modal.classList.remove('hidden'); modal.classList.add('flex');
  },

  confirmVariant() {
    const p = this.currentProductForVariant;
    if (!p) return;
    const variant = p.product_variants.find(v =>
      (!this._selColor || v.color_name === this._selColor) &&
      (!this._selSize  || v.size       === this._selSize)
    );
    if (!variant) { this.showToast('Vui lòng chọn phân loại', false); return; }
    if ((variant.stock || 0) <= 0) { this.showToast('Phân loại này đã hết hàng', false); return; }
    this.addToCart(p, variant, variant.price_override || p.price);
    this.closeVariantModal();
  },

  closeVariantModal() {
    const m = document.getElementById('variantModal');
    m.classList.add('hidden'); m.classList.remove('flex');
    this.currentProductForVariant = null;
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  //  CART
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  addToCart(product, variant, price) {
    const key      = variant ? `${product.id}_${variant.id}` : product.id;
    const existing = this.cart.find(i => i.cid === key);
    if (existing) {
      existing.qty++;
    } else {
      this.cart.push({ cid: key, product, variant, price, qty: 1 });
    }
    this.renderCart();
    this.showToast(`Đã thêm: ${product.name}`, true);
  },

  updateQty(cid, delta) {
    const idx = this.cart.findIndex(i => i.cid === cid);
    if (idx < 0) return;
    this.cart[idx].qty += delta;
    if (this.cart[idx].qty <= 0) this.cart.splice(idx, 1);
    this.renderCart();
  },

  renderCart() {
    const list = document.getElementById('cartItemsList');
    const msg  = document.getElementById('emptyCartMsg');
    const btn  = document.getElementById('btnCheckout');

    if (!this.cart.length) {
      list.innerHTML = ''; msg.style.display = 'flex'; btn.disabled = true;
      ['cartCountTotal', 'txtSubtotal', 'txtDiscount'].forEach(id =>
        document.getElementById(id).textContent =
          id === 'txtDiscount' ? '- 0 ₫' : '0' + (id === 'cartCountTotal' ? '' : ' ₫')
      );
      document.getElementById('txtTotal').textContent = '0 ₫';
      document.getElementById('posCouponWarning').classList.add('hidden');
      return;
    }

    msg.style.display = 'none'; btn.disabled = false;
    list.innerHTML = this.cart.map(item => `
      <div class="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 border border-neutral-200 rounded-sm bg-white shadow-sm hover:border-black transition-colors">
        <div class="w-12 h-16 bg-[#f8f8f8] rounded-sm border border-neutral-200 overflow-hidden flex-shrink-0">
          ${this.renderThumb(item.product.thumbnail_url)}
        </div>
        <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
          <p class="text-[10px] font-bold text-black uppercase line-clamp-2 leading-snug">${item.product.name}</p>
          ${item.variant
            ? `<p class="text-[9px] font-bold text-neutral-400 uppercase mt-1 tracking-widest">
                ${item.variant.color_name || ''} ${item.variant.size ? '- Size ' + item.variant.size : ''}
               </p>` : ''}
          <p class="text-[10px] font-black text-red-500 mt-1">${this.fmt(item.price)}</p>
        </div>
        <div class="flex items-center border border-neutral-200 bg-neutral-50 rounded-sm overflow-hidden h-8">
          <button onclick="POS.updateQty('${item.cid}',-1)" class="w-8 h-full text-neutral-500 hover:bg-white hover:text-black border-r border-neutral-200">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-minus text-[10px]"></i>
          </button>
          <span class="w-8 text-center text-[11px] font-bold tabular-nums bg-white h-full flex items-center justify-center">${item.qty}</span>
          <button onclick="POS.updateQty('${item.cid}',1)" class="w-8 h-full text-neutral-500 hover:bg-white hover:text-black border-l border-neutral-200">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-plus text-[10px]"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>`).join('');

    this.calcTotal();
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  //  TOTALS
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  calcTotal() {
    let subtotal = 0, totalQty = 0;
    this.cart.forEach(i => { subtotal += i.price * i.qty; totalQty += i.qty; });

    const cp   = document.getElementById('posCoupon');
    const warn = document.getElementById('posCouponWarning');
    let discount = 0;
    warn.classList.add('hidden');

    if (cp.value && subtotal > 0) {
      const opt  = cp.options[cp.selectedIndex];
      const minV = parseFloat(opt.dataset.min) || 0;
      if (subtotal < minV) {
        warn.textContent = `Yêu cầu đơn tối thiểu ${this.fmt(minV)}`;
        warn.classList.remove('hidden');
      } else {
        const val  = parseFloat(opt.dataset.value);
        const maxV = parseFloat(opt.dataset.max) || 0;
        discount = opt.dataset.type === 'percent' ? subtotal * (val / 100) : val;
        if (maxV > 0 && discount > maxV) discount = maxV;
        if (discount > subtotal) discount = subtotal;
      }
    }

    const total = Math.max(0, subtotal - discount);
    document.getElementById('cartCountTotal').textContent = totalQty;
    document.getElementById('txtSubtotal').textContent    = this.fmt(subtotal);
    document.getElementById('txtDiscount').textContent    = '- ' + this.fmt(discount);
    document.getElementById('txtTotal').textContent       = this.fmt(total);
    this.calcChange();
    if (this.method === 'transfer') this._updateTransferQR();
  },

  calcChange() {
    if (this.method !== 'cash') return;
    // Lấy tổng đơn hàng: xóa mọi ký tự không phải số (dấu chấm, ₫, khoảng trắng)
    const total = this.parseInputMoney(
      document.getElementById('txtTotal').textContent
    );
    // Lấy tiền khách đưa: dùng parseInputMoney để xử lý cả "500.000" lẫn "500000"
    const given  = this.parseInputMoney(
      document.getElementById('inputCash').value
    );
    const change = given >= total ? given - total : 0;
    document.getElementById('txtChange').textContent = this.fmt(change);
    document.getElementById('txtChange').classList.toggle('text-red-500',    given > 0 && given < total);
    document.getElementById('txtChange').classList.toggle('text-emerald-600', given >= total || given === 0);
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  //  CHECKOUT
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  submit: async function() {
    if (!this.cart.length) return;

    if (this.method === 'cash') {
      const total = this.parseInputMoney(
        document.getElementById('txtTotal').textContent
      );
      const given = this.parseInputMoney(
        document.getElementById('inputCash').value
      );
      if (total > 0 && given < total) { this.showToast('Tiền khách đưa chưa đủ!', false); return; }
    }

    const btn = document.getElementById('btnCheckout');
    btn.disabled = true;
    document.getElementById('lblCheckout').innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-rotate spin mr-2"></i>ĐANG XỬ LÝ...';

    const cp        = document.getElementById('posCoupon');
    const discountN = parseFloat(document.getElementById('txtDiscount').textContent.replace(/[^\d]/g, '')) || 0;

    const payload = {
      payment_method: this.method,
      discount:       discountN,
      coupon_id:      cp.value || null,
      items: this.cart.map(i => ({
        product_id: i.product.id,
        variant_id: i.variant ? i.variant.id : '',
        quantity:   i.qty,
        price:      i.price,
        name:       `${i.product.name}${i.variant
          ? ` (${i.variant.color_name || ''} ${i.variant.size ? 'Size ' + i.variant.size : ''})`
          : ''}`
      }))
    };

    try {
      const res  = await fetch("{{ url_for('admin.pos_checkout') }}", {
        method:  'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-CSRFToken': '{{ csrf_token() }}' },
        body:    JSON.stringify(payload)
      });
      const data = await res.json();

      if (data.success) {
        if (this.method === 'cash') {
          this.showToast('THANH TOÁN THÀNH CÔNG', true);
          this.printReceipt(data.invoice);
          this.resetCart();
        } else {
          this._pendingInvoice = data.invoice;
          this.openTransferModal();
          this.startPolling(data.order_id);
        }
      } else {
        this.showToast(data.message || 'Lỗi xử lý', false);
      }
    } catch(e) {
      this.showToast('Lỗi kết nối máy chủ', false);
    } finally {
      btn.disabled = false;
      document.getElementById('lblCheckout').innerHTML =
        '<i class="fa-solid fa-print mr-2"></i>THANH TOÁN & IN BILL';
    }
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  //  TRANSFER MODAL + POLLING (Casso)
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  openTransferModal() {
    const m = document.getElementById('transferWaitModal');
    m.classList.remove('hidden'); m.classList.add('flex');
    document.getElementById('twIcon').innerHTML    = '<i class="fa-solid fa-rotate spin"></i>';
    document.getElementById('twTitle').textContent = 'Đang chờ thanh toán...';
    document.getElementById('twSub').textContent   = 'Hệ thống tự động xác nhận khi nhận được tiền';
    document.getElementById('twActions').classList.add('hidden');
    document.getElementById('twCancelBtn').classList.remove('hidden');
  },

  startPolling(orderId) {
    clearInterval(this._pollTimer);
    this._pollTimer = setInterval(async () => {
      try {
        const r = await fetch(`/admin/pos-check-payment/${orderId}`, {
          headers: { 'X-CSRFToken': '{{ csrf_token() }}' }
        });
        const d = await r.json();
        if (d.paid) { clearInterval(this._pollTimer); this.onTransferConfirmed(); }
      } catch(e) {}
    }, 3000);
  },

  onTransferConfirmed() {
    document.getElementById('twIcon').innerHTML    = '<i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check text-emerald-500"></i>';
    document.getElementById('twTitle').textContent = 'THANH TOÁN THÀNH CÔNG!';
    document.getElementById('twSub').textContent   = 'Chuyển khoản đã được xác nhận';
    document.getElementById('twActions').classList.remove('hidden');
    document.getElementById('twActions').classList.add('flex');
    document.getElementById('twCancelBtn').classList.add('hidden');
    this.showToast('THANH TOÁN THÀNH CÔNG', true);
    this.resetCart();
  },

  printReceiptFromModal() {
    if (this._pendingInvoice) this.printReceipt(this._pendingInvoice);
  },

  cancelTransferWait() {
    clearInterval(this._pollTimer);
    document.getElementById('transferWaitModal').classList.add('hidden');
    document.getElementById('transferWaitModal').classList.remove('flex');
  },

  closeTransferModal() {
    clearInterval(this._pollTimer);
    this.cancelTransferWait();
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  //  RESET
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  resetCart() {
    this.cart = [];
    document.getElementById('posCoupon').value   = '';
    document.getElementById('inputCash').value   = '';
    document.getElementById('txtChange').textContent = '0 ₫';
    this.renderCart();
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  //  PRINT RECEIPT (mở cửa sổ in 80mm)
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  printReceipt(inv) {
    const methodLabel = inv.payment_method === 'cash' ? 'Tiền mặt' : 'Chuyển khoản';
    const rows = inv.items.map((i, idx) => `
      <tr>
        <td style="text-align:center;padding:3px 2px;">${idx + 1}</td>
        <td style="padding:3px 4px;">${i.name}</td>
        <td style="text-align:center;padding:3px 2px;">${i.qty}</td>
        <td style="text-align:right;padding:3px 2px;">${Number(i.price).toLocaleString('vi-VN')}</td>
        <td style="text-align:right;padding:3px 2px;">${(i.qty * i.price).toLocaleString('vi-VN')}</td>
      </tr>`).join('');

    const cashGiven  = this.parseInputMoney(document.getElementById('inputCash')?.value);
    const changeBack = cashGiven - inv.total;
    const cashRows   = inv.payment_method === 'cash' && cashGiven > 0 ? `
      <div class="flex"><span>Tiền khách đưa:</span><span>${cashGiven.toLocaleString('vi-VN')}</span></div>
      <div class="flex"><span>Tiền thối lại:</span><span>${Math.max(0, changeBack).toLocaleString('vi-VN')}</span></div>` : '';

    const html = `<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="vi"><head><meta charset="UTF-8">
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inconsolata:wght@400;700&display=swap');
  @page { margin: 0; }
  body { font-family:'Inconsolata',monospace; width:80mm; margin:0 auto; color:#000; font-size:12px; padding:8mm 4mm; line-height:1.5; }
  .center { text-align:center; } .bold { font-weight:700; }
  .flex { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; }
  .divider { border:none; border-bottom:1px dashed #000; margin:6px 0; }
  .store { font-size:20px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px; }
  table { width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; font-size:11px; }
  th { border-bottom:1px solid #000; padding:3px 2px; font-weight:700; }
  td { vertical-align:top; }
  .total { font-size:14px; font-weight:700; }
</style></head><body>
  <div class="center">
    <div class="store">GUA MAISON</div>
    <div>123 Nguyễn Trãi, Q1, TP.HCM</div>
    <div>0909 123 456</div>
  </div>
  <hr class="divider">
  <div class="center bold" style="font-size:15px;margin:6px 0;">HÓA ĐƠN BÁN LẺ</div>
  <div style="margin-bottom:6px;">
    <div class="flex"><span>Số HĐ:</span><span class="bold">${inv.order_code}</span></div>
    <div class="flex"><span>Ngày:</span><span>${inv.date}</span></div>
    <div class="flex"><span>Thanh toán:</span><span class="bold">${methodLabel}</span></div>
  </div>
  <hr class="divider">
  <table>
    <thead><tr>
      <th style="text-align:center;width:20px">STT</th>
      <th style="text-align:left">Tên SP</th>
      <th style="text-align:center;width:24px">SL</th>
      <th style="text-align:right;width:55px">Đ.Giá</th>
      <th style="text-align:right;width:60px">T.Tiền</th>
    </tr></thead>
    <tbody>${rows}</tbody>
  </table>
  <hr class="divider">
  <div class="flex"><span>Tạm tính:</span><span>${inv.subtotal.toLocaleString('vi-VN')}</span></div>
  ${inv.discount > 0 ? `<div class="flex"><span>Giảm giá:</span><span>- ${inv.discount.toLocaleString('vi-VN')}</span></div>` : ''}
  <hr class="divider">
  <div class="flex total"><span>THỰC THU:</span><span>${inv.total.toLocaleString('vi-VN')} ₫</span></div>
  ${cashRows}
  <hr class="divider">
  <div class="center" style="margin-top:10px;">
    <div class="bold">CẢM ƠN QUÝ KHÁCH!</div>
    <div style="font-size:10px;margin-top:4px;">Vui lòng giữ hóa đơn để đổi trả trong 7 ngày</div>
  </div>
<script>window.onload=function(){window.print();setTimeout(()=>window.close(),500);}<\/script>
</body></html>`;

    const w = window.open('', '_blank', 'width=420,height=680');
    w.document.open(); w.document.write(html); w.document.close();
  }

}; // end POS

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => POS.init());
</script>
</file>

<file path="app/templates/admin/pos/pos_terminal.html">
{% extends "admin/admin_base.html" %}
{% block title %}Máy Bán Hàng Tại Quầy (POS) | GUA Admin{% endblock %}

{% block extra_head %}
<!-- QuaggaJS: đọc barcode qua camera -->
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/quagga/0.12.1/quagga.min.js"></script>
<style>
  input[type=number]::-webkit-inner-spin-button,
  input[type=number]::-webkit-outer-spin-button { -webkit-appearance: none; margin: 0; }
  input[type=number] { -moz-appearance: textfield; }
  .no-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
  .no-scrollbar { -ms-overflow-style: none; scrollbar-width: none; }
  @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
  .spin { animation: spin 1s linear infinite; display: inline-block; }

  /* Camera barcode scanner overlay */
  #barcodeCameraModal #interactive.viewport { position: relative; width: 100%; }
  #barcodeCameraModal #interactive.viewport canvas,
  #barcodeCameraModal #interactive.viewport video { width: 100%; height: 240px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 4px; }
  #barcodeCameraModal #interactive.viewport canvas.drawingBuffer { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; }
  #barcodeCameraModal .laser {
    position: absolute; left: 10%; right: 10%; top: 50%; height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, #ef4444, transparent);
    animation: laser 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
  }

  /* Flash xanh khi USB scanner quét thành công */

  .scan-flash { animation: scanFlash 0.4s ease; }
</style>

{% block content %}
{# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   LAYOUT CHÍNH — Header + 2 cột (Sản phẩm | Giỏ hàng)
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ #}
<div class="h-screen flex flex-col bg-[#f8f8f8] font-sans overflow-hidden selection:bg-black selection:text-white">

  {# ── HEADER ── #}
  <div class="bg-white border-b border-neutral-200 flex-shrink-0 z-30">
    <div class="px-4 md:px-6 py-3 flex items-center justify-between">
      <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
        <div class="w-10 h-10 bg-black text-white flex items-center justify-center rounded-sm">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-cash-register"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h1 class="text-lg font-bold tracking-tight text-black uppercase">POS Terminal</h1>
          <p class="text-[9px] font-bold text-emerald-600 uppercase tracking-widest mt-0.5 flex items-center gap-1.5">
            <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-emerald-500 rounded-full animate-pulse"></span> Online &amp; Sync
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <a href="{{ url_for('admin.reports') }}"
        class="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-neutral-500 hover:text-black transition-colors flex items-center gap-2 border border-neutral-200 px-3 py-2 rounded-sm bg-white hover:bg-neutral-50">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-left"></i> Thoát POS
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="flex-1 flex flex-col lg:flex-row overflow-hidden relative">

    {# ── LEFT: TÌM KIẾM + GRID SẢN PHẨM ── #}
    <div class="w-full lg:w-[55%] xl:w-[65%] flex flex-col border-b lg:border-b-0 lg:border-r border-neutral-200 bg-white h-[50vh] lg:h-full">

      {# Ô tìm kiếm / barcode #}
      <div class="p-4 md:p-5 border-b border-neutral-100 flex-shrink-0 relative" id="searchWrapper">
        <div class="relative">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-barcode absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-neutral-400"></i>
          <input id="posSearch" type="text" placeholder="Quét mã vạch hoặc nhập tên sản phẩm..." autocomplete="off"
            class="w-full pl-10 pr-20 py-3.5 border border-neutral-300 focus:border-black rounded-sm text-sm font-bold outline-none transition-colors"
            oninput="POS.filterProducts()" onfocus="POS.filterProducts()">
          <button onclick="POS.openCameraScanner()" title="Quét barcode bằng camera"
            class="absolute right-10 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-neutral-400 hover:text-black transition-colors p-1">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-camera text-sm"></i>
          </button>
          <button id="posClearSearch" onclick="POS.clearSearch()"
            class="absolute right-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 hidden text-neutral-400 hover:text-black">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
        <div id="usbScannerStatus" class="mt-1.5 flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[9px] font-bold text-neutral-400 uppercase tracking-widest">
          <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-emerald-400 rounded-full"></span>
          USB Scanner sẵn sàng — cắm máy quét và quét thẳng vào đây
        </div>
        <div id="posDropdown"
          class="hidden absolute left-4 right-4 md:left-5 md:right-5 top-[78px] bg-white border border-neutral-200 shadow-2xl z-50 max-h-[50vh] overflow-y-auto no-scrollbar rounded-sm">
        </div>
      </div>

      {# Grid sản phẩm nổi bật #}
      <div class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto no-scrollbar p-4 md:p-5 bg-[#f8f8f8]">
        <h3 class="text-[10px] font-bold text-neutral-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-4">Sản phẩm nổi bật</h3>
        <div class="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-3 md:gap-4 pb-10" id="quickProductsGrid"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    {# ── RIGHT: GIỎ HÀNG + THANH TOÁN ── #}
    <div class="w-full lg:w-[45%] xl:w-[35%] flex flex-col bg-white h-[50vh] lg:h-full z-10 shadow-[-10px_0_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]">

      {# Danh sách giỏ hàng #}
      <div class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto no-scrollbar p-4 md:p-5" id="cartContainer">
        <div class="h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-neutral-300 opacity-60" id="emptyCartMsg">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-cart-arrow-down text-4xl mb-4"></i>
          <p class="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest">Giỏ hàng đang trống</p>
        </div>
        <div id="cartItemsList" class="flex flex-col gap-2"></div>
      </div>

      {# Coupon #}
      <div class="px-4 md:px-5 py-3 md:py-4 border-t border-neutral-100 bg-neutral-50 flex-shrink-0 space-y-2">
        <div class="relative">
          <select id="posCoupon" onchange="POS.calcTotal()"
            class="w-full pl-9 pr-8 py-3 border border-neutral-200 focus:border-black rounded-sm text-xs font-bold bg-white outline-none text-red-600 appearance-none cursor-pointer shadow-sm">
            <option value="" class="text-black">-- Chọn mã giảm giá --</option>
            {% for c in coupons %}
            <option value="{{ c.id }}" data-type="{{ c.discount_type }}" data-value="{{ c.discount_value }}"
              data-max="{{ c.max_discount or 0 }}" data-min="{{ c.min_order_value or 0 }}">
              {{ c.code }}
              {% if c.discount_type == 'percent' %}(-{{ c.discount_value }}%){% else %}(-{{ '{:,.0f}'.format(c.discount_value) }}đ){% endif %}
            </option>
            {% endfor %}
          </select>
          <i class="fa-solid fa-ticket absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-neutral-400 pointer-events-none"></i>
          <i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-down absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-[10px] text-neutral-400 pointer-events-none"></i>
        </div>
        <div id="posCouponWarning" class="hidden px-3 py-2 text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-amber-600 border border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 rounded-sm"></div>
      </div>

      {# Tổng tiền #}
      <div class="px-4 md:px-5 pt-4 border-t border-neutral-200 flex-shrink-0 bg-white space-y-2.5">
        <div class="flex justify-between items-center text-xs">
          <span class="text-neutral-500 font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.1em]">Tổng <span id="cartCountTotal" class="text-black">0</span> SP</span>
          <span id="txtSubtotal" class="font-bold text-black tabular-nums">0 ₫</span>
        </div>
        <div class="flex justify-between items-center text-xs text-red-500">
          <span class="font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.1em]">Giảm giá</span>
          <span id="txtDiscount" class="font-bold tabular-nums">- 0 ₫</span>
        </div>
        <div class="border-t border-dashed border-neutral-200 pt-3 flex justify-between items-center">
          <span class="text-xs font-black text-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em]">Khách cần trả</span>
          <span id="txtTotal" class="text-2xl font-black text-emerald-600 tabular-nums">0 ₫</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      {# Phương thức thanh toán #}
      <div class="px-4 md:px-5 py-3 border-t border-neutral-100 bg-white flex-shrink-0">

        <div class="mt-6 pt-6 border-t border-stone-200 space-y-4">
          <h3 class="text-sm font-bold text-stone-900 flex items-center gap-2">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-money-bill-transfer text-emerald-600"></i>
            Xác nhận hoàn tiền
          </h3>
          <div class="p-3.5 bg-blue-50/50 rounded-xl border border-blue-100/50 text-xs text-blue-800 space-y-2 leading-relaxed">
            <p class="font-bold flex items-center gap-1.5"><i class="fa-solid fa-list-check"></i> Quy trình xử lý:</p>
            <ul class="list-decimal list-inside space-y-1 text-blue-700/90 ml-1">
              <li>Liên hệ SĐT: <strong class="text-blue-900">{{ user.get('phone', '(chưa có)') }}</strong></li>
              <li>Thực hiện nhận lại hàng hóa</li>
              <li>Chuyển khoản hoàn tiền cho khách</li>
              <li>Nhập số tiền và bấm xác nhận bên dưới</li>
            </ul>
          </div>
          
          <form action="{{ url_for('admin.complete_refund', rr_id=rr.id) }}" method="POST" class="space-y-4"
                onsubmit="return confirm('XÁC NHẬN HÀNH ĐỘNG:\n\nBạn chắc chắn đã hoàn tiền thành công cho khách hàng?\nDoanh thu của hệ thống sẽ bị trừ đi tương ứng.')">
            <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
            <div>
              <label class="text-xs font-bold text-stone-700 block mb-2">Số tiền thực tế đã hoàn</label>
              <div class="relative">
                <input type="number" name="refund_amount" step="1000" min="1000"
                       placeholder="{{ order.get('total_amount', 0)|int }}"
                       class="w-full text-base font-semibold rounded-xl border border-stone-200 pl-4 pr-10 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500/20 focus:border-emerald-500 transition-shadow">
                <span class="absolute right-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-sm text-stone-400 font-bold">VNĐ</span>
              </div>
              <p class="text-[11px] text-stone-500 mt-1.5">Để trống nếu hoàn toàn bộ <strong class="text-stone-700">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(order.get('total_amount', 0)) }}đ</strong></p>
            </div>
            <button type="submit"
                    class="w-full h-12 bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-700 text-white text-sm font-bold rounded-xl transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md flex items-center justify-center gap-2 active:scale-[0.98]">
              Hoàn tất quy trình đổi/trả
            </button>
          </form>
        </div>
        {% endif %}

        {# ── rejected: Thông báo cuối ── #}
        {% if rr.status == 'rejected' %}
        <div class="mt-6 pt-6 border-t border-stone-200">
          <div class="bg-red-50 rounded-xl border border-red-100 p-4 text-center">
            <div class="w-10 h-10 bg-red-100 text-red-500 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-2">
              <svg class="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 18 18 6M6 6l12 12"/></svg>
            </div>
            <p class="text-sm font-bold text-red-800">Yêu cầu bị từ chối</p>
            <p class="text-xs text-red-600 mt-1 leading-relaxed">Hồ sơ này đã đóng. Khách hàng có thể tạo yêu cầu mới nếu cần thiết.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        {% endif %}

      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  function validateRejectNote(form) {
    const note = form.querySelector('[name="admin_note"]').value.trim();
    if (!note) {
      alert("Vui lòng nhập lý do từ chối để thông báo cho khách hàng.");
      form.querySelector('[name="admin_note"]').focus();
      return false;
    }
    return confirm("CẢNH BÁO: Xác nhận TỪ CHỐI yêu cầu này?\n\nLý do: " + note);
  }
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

            </td>

.btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--text2) }

/* ── MODAL ── */

      <div class="sp-stat__icon sp-stat__icon--red">⏸</div>

          <th style="width:110px">Trạng thái</th>
          <th style="width:130px; text-align:right">Thao tác</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody id="tbody">
        {% for p in providers %}
        <tr class="sp-row{% if not p.is_active %} sp-row--off{% endif %}" data-id="{{ p.id }}">
          <td><span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;color:var(--text3)">{{ p.sort_order or 0 }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="sp-provider">
              <div class="sp-avatar">
                {% if p.icon %}
                  {% if p.icon.startswith('fa-') or p.icon.startswith('fas ') or p.icon.startswith('far ') %}
                    <i class="fa-solid {{ p.icon }}" style="font-size:15px;color:var(--accent)"></i>
                  {% elif p.icon.startswith('http') %}
                    <img src="{{ p.icon }}" alt="">
                  {% else %}
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-{{ p.icon }}" style="font-size:15px;color:var(--accent)"></i>
                  {% endif %}
                {% else %}
                  {{ p.name[0]|upper }}
                {% endif %}
              </div>
              <div>
                <div class="sp-name">{{ p.name }}</div>

              </div>

              <span class="sp-dot"></span>{% if p.is_active %}Bật{% else %}Tắt{% endif %}
            </button>
          </td>
          <td>
            <div class="sp-actions">
              <button class="btn-icon" onclick="openEdit('{{ p.id }}')" title="Chỉnh sửa">
                <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M11 4H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v14a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h14a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-7"/><path d="M18.5 2.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L12 15l-4 1 1-4 9.5-9.5z"/></svg>
              </button>
              <button class="btn-icon" onclick="openConfig('{{ p.id }}')" title="Cấu hình API">
                <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/><path d="M19.07 4.93l-1.41 1.41M4.93 4.93l1.41 1.41M12 2v2M12 20v2M2 12h2M20 12h2M19.07 19.07l-1.41-1.41M4.93 19.07l1.41-1.41"/></svg>
              </button>
              <button class="btn-icon btn-icon--del" onclick="doDel('{{ p.id }}','{{ p.name }}')" title="Xóa">
                <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"/><path d="M19 6l-1 14H6L5 6"/><path d="M10 11v6M14 11v6"/><path d="M9 6V4h6v2"/></svg>
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
        {% else %}
        <tr><td colspan="5" class="sp-empty">Chưa có hãng nào. <a href="#" onclick="openAdd()">Thêm ngay →</a></td></tr>
        {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- MODAL: THÊM / SỬA -->
<div class="sp-overlay" id="ovMain" onclick="if(e.target===this)closeAll()">
  <div class="sp-modal">
    <div class="sp-modal__head">
      <span class="sp-modal__title" id="mTitle">Thêm đơn vị vận chuyển</span>
      <button class="sp-modal__close" onclick="closeAll()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="sp-modal__body">
      <form id="mainForm" onsubmit="doSubmit(event)">
        <input type="hidden" id="fEditId">
        <div class="sp-grid">
          <div class="sp-field" id="fIdWrap">
            <label>ID / Slug <span class="req">*</span></label>
            <input type="text" id="fId" placeholder="ghn, ghtk, j_and_t" autocomplete="off">
            <small>Chữ thường, không dấu, không khoảng trắng</small>
          </div>
          <div class="sp-field">
            <label>Tên hãng <span class="req">*</span></label>
            <input type="text" id="fName" placeholder="Giao Hàng Nhanh">
          </div>
          <div class="sp-field sp-field--full">
            <label>Mô tả</label>
            <input type="text" id="fDesc" placeholder="Mô tả ngắn...">
          </div>
          <div class="sp-field">
            <label>Icon URL</label>
            <input type="text" id="fIcon" placeholder="https://...">
          </div>
          <div class="sp-field">
            <label>Thứ tự hiển thị</label>
            <input type="number" id="fSort" value="0" min="0">
          </div>
          <div class="sp-field sp-field--full">
            <label class="sp-check">
              <input type="checkbox" id="fActive">
              Kích hoạt ngay sau khi tạo
            </label>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="sp-modal__foot" style="padding:16px 0 0;border-top:none">
          <button type="button" class="btn-ghost" onclick="closeAll()">Hủy</button>
          <button type="submit" class="btn-primary" id="btnOk">Tạo mới</button>
        </div>
      </form>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- MODAL: CẤU HÌNH API -->
<div class="sp-overlay" id="ovConfig" onclick="if(e.target===this)closeAll()">
  <div class="sp-modal sp-modal--wide">
    <div class="sp-modal__head">
      <span class="sp-modal__title">Cấu hình API — <span id="cfgName"></span></span>
      <button class="sp-modal__close" onclick="closeAll()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="sp-modal__body">
      <p class="sp-hint">Lưu API key, token, shop ID vào trường <code>config</code> (JSON).</p>
      <div class="sp-field">
        <textarea id="cfgJson" class="sp-json" rows="10" spellcheck="false"></textarea>
        <div id="cfgErr" class="sp-json-err"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="sp-modal__foot">
      <button type="button" class="btn-ghost" onclick="closeAll()">Hủy</button>
      <button type="button" class="btn-primary" onclick="saveConfig()">Lưu cấu hình</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="toast" class="sp-toast"></div>

<script>
const BASE = '/admin/shipping/providers/api';
let cfgId = null;

const $  = id => document.getElementById(id);

// ── CSRF: lấy token từ meta tag (Flask-WTF inject sẵn) ──
const getCsrf = () => document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '';

// ── api helper: tự động đính kèm CSRF cho mọi request ──
const api = (url, opt={}) => {
  const headers = { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-CSRFToken': getCsrf(), ...opt.headers };
  return fetch(url, { ...opt, headers }).then(r => r.json());
};

const toast = (msg, ok=true) => {
  const el = $('toast');
  el.textContent = msg;
  el.className = `sp-toast show sp-toast--${ok?'ok':'err'}`;
  setTimeout(()=>el.classList.remove('show'), 3000);
};

const closeAll = () => document.querySelectorAll('.sp-overlay').forEach(o=>o.classList.remove('show'));
const openOv   = id => $(id).classList.add('show');

// ── Stats refresh ──
const refreshStats = () => {
  const rows = document.querySelectorAll('#tbody tr[data-id]');
  const on   = document.querySelectorAll('#tbody tr[data-id]:not(.sp-row--off)').length;
  $('sTotal').textContent = rows.length;
  $('sActive').textContent = on;
  $('sOff').textContent = rows.length - on;
};

// ── Add ──
const openAdd = () => {
  $('mTitle').textContent = 'Thêm đơn vị vận chuyển';
  $('btnOk').textContent  = 'Tạo mới';
  $('fEditId').value = '';
  $('mainForm').reset();
  $('fIdWrap').style.display = '';
  openOv('ovMain');
  $('fId').focus();
};

// ── Edit ──
const openEdit = async id => {
  const d = await api(`${BASE}/${id}`);
  if (!d.id) return toast('Không tải được dữ liệu', false);
  $('mTitle').textContent = 'Chỉnh sửa hãng vận chuyển';
  $('btnOk').textContent  = 'Lưu thay đổi';
  $('fEditId').value      = id;
  $('fIdWrap').style.display = 'none';
  $('fId').value    = d.id;
  $('fName').value  = d.name || '';
  $('fDesc').value  = d.description || '';
  $('fIcon').value  = d.icon || '';
  $('fSort').value  = d.sort_order ?? 0;
  $('fActive').checked = !!d.is_active;
  openOv('ovMain');
  $('fName').focus();
};

// ── Submit ──
const doSubmit = async e => {
  e.preventDefault();
  const editId = $('fEditId').value.trim();
  const body = {
    id:          $('fId').value.trim(),
    name:        $('fName').value.trim(),
    description: $('fDesc').value.trim(),
    icon:        $('fIcon').value.trim(),
    sort_order:  parseInt($('fSort').value) || 0,
    is_active:   $('fActive').checked,
  };
  const res = await api(editId ? `${BASE}/${editId}` : BASE, {
    method: editId ? 'PUT' : 'POST',
    body: JSON.stringify(body)
  });
  if (!res.success) return toast(res.message || 'Lỗi hệ thống', false);
  toast(editId ? 'Đã cập nhật!' : 'Tạo mới thành công!');
  closeAll();
  setTimeout(()=>location.reload(), 700);
};

// ── Toggle ──
const doToggle = async (id, btn) => {
  const res = await api(`${BASE}/${id}/toggle`, { method:'PATCH' });
  if (!res.success) return toast('Cập nhật thất bại', false);
  const on = res.data.is_active;
  btn.classList.toggle('sp-toggle--on', on);
  btn.textContent = '';
  const dot = document.createElement('span'); dot.className='sp-dot'; btn.appendChild(dot);
  btn.append(on ? 'Bật' : 'Tắt');
  btn.closest('tr').classList.toggle('sp-row--off', !on);
  refreshStats();
  toast(`Đã ${on?'kích hoạt':'tạm dừng'} hãng vận chuyển.`);
};

// ── Delete ──
const doDel = async (id, name) => {
  if (!confirm(`Xóa hãng "${name}"?\n\nHành động không thể hoàn tác.`)) return;
  const res = await api(`${BASE}/${id}`, { method:'DELETE' });
  if (!res.success) return toast(res.message || 'Xóa thất bại', false);
  document.querySelector(`tr[data-id="${id}"]`)?.remove();
  refreshStats();
  toast(`Đã xóa "${name}".`);
};

// ── Config ──
const openConfig = async id => {
  const d = await api(`${BASE}/${id}`);
  if (!d.id) return toast('Không tải được dữ liệu', false);
  cfgId = id;
  $('cfgName').textContent = d.name;
  $('cfgJson').value = JSON.stringify(d.config || {}, null, 2);
  $('cfgErr').textContent = '';
  openOv('ovConfig');
  $('cfgJson').focus();
};

const saveConfig = async () => {
  let parsed;
  try { parsed = JSON.parse($('cfgJson').value) }
  catch { $('cfgErr').textContent = '⚠ JSON không hợp lệ.'; return }
  const res = await api(`${BASE}/${cfgId}`, { method:'PUT', body:JSON.stringify({config:parsed}) });
  if (!res.success) return toast('Lưu thất bại', false);
  toast('Đã lưu cấu hình!');
  closeAll();
};

$('cfgJson')?.addEventListener('input', function() {
  try { JSON.parse(this.value); $('cfgErr').textContent='' }
  catch { $('cfgErr').textContent='⚠ JSON chưa hợp lệ...' }
});
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

<file path="app/templates/admin/shipping_tester.html">
{% extends "admin/admin_base.html" %}
{% block title %}Shipping API Tester | GUA Admin{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="min-h-screen bg-[#f7f4ef] pb-24 font-sans">

    <div class="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 py-5">
      <h1 class="text-2xl font-black text-[#1a1a1a] tracking-tight">Shipping API Tester</h1>
      <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-[#a09890] uppercase tracking-widest mt-1">Unified Courier Interface (Purplship Style)</p>
    </div>
  </header>

  <div class="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 mt-10">
    <div class="bg-white rounded-[2rem] border border-[#e8e4de] p-8 shadow-sm">
      
      <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
        
        {# ── CỘT CẤU HÌNH ── #}
        <div class="space-y-6">
          <div>
            <label class="block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-[#1a1a1a] mb-2">Chọn Đối tác (Provider)</label>
            <select id="provider" class="w-full bg-[#fafaf8] border-2 border-[#e8e4de] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm font-bold text-[#1a1a1a] outline-none focus:border-[#1a1a1a] transition-all">
              <option value="mock">MOCK (Môi trường Test an toàn)</option>
              <option value="ghn">Giao Hàng Nhanh (GHN)</option>
              <option value="ghtk">Giao Hàng Tiết Kiệm (GHTK)</option>
            </select>
          </div>

          <div class="space-y-3 pt-4 border-t border-[#e8e4de]">
            <button onclick="testAPI('fee')" class="w-full py-3.5 bg-white border-2 border-[#1a1a1a] text-[#1a1a1a] rounded-xl text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-[#1a1a1a] hover:text-white transition-all shadow-sm">
              [GET] Calculate Fee
            </button>
            <button onclick="testAPI('create')" class="w-full py-3.5 bg-[#1a1a1a] border-2 border-[#1a1a1a] text-white rounded-xl text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-[#333] transition-all shadow-sm">
              [POST] Create Order
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {# ── CỘT LOG JSON ── #}
        <div>
          <label class="block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-[#1a1a1a] mb-2">Log Response JSON</label>
          <div class="bg-[#1a1a1a] rounded-[1.5rem] p-5 h-[300px] overflow-y-auto relative shadow-inner">
            <div id="loading" class="absolute inset-0 bg-[#1a1a1a]/80 backdrop-blur-sm hidden flex-col items-center justify-center text-white z-10">
               <svg class="w-6 h-6 animate-spin mb-2" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle class="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="4"/><path class="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8v8H4z"/></svg>
               <span class="text-[10px] font-bold tracking-widest uppercase">Đang gọi API...</span>
            </div>
            
            <pre id="json-output" class="text-xs font-mono text-[#a3d9b8] leading-relaxed break-all">
// Chọn chức năng và nhấn nút
// Response sẽ hiển thị tại đây...
            </pre>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
async function testAPI(action) {
    const provider = document.getElementById('provider').value;
    const loading = document.getElementById('loading');
    const output = document.getElementById('json-output');
    
    loading.classList.remove('hidden');
    loading.classList.add('flex');
    output.textContent = '';

    const url = action === 'fee' ? '/admin/shipping/api/test-fee' : '/admin/shipping/api/test-create';
    
    // Payload giả lập gửi lên
    const payload = {
        provider: provider,
        to_district: "Quận 1",
        weight: 500
    };

    try {
        const res = await fetch(url, {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 
                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                'X-CSRFToken': '{{ csrf_token() }}' 
            },
            body: JSON.stringify(payload)
        });
        
        const data = await res.json();
        
        // Đổi màu text dựa trên Success/False
        output.className = data.success 
            ? 'text-xs font-mono text-[#a3d9b8] leading-relaxed break-all' 
            : 'text-xs font-mono text-[#f8b4c4] leading-relaxed break-all';
            
        // Hiển thị JSON format đẹp
        output.textContent = JSON.stringify(data, null, 4);
    } catch (e) {
        output.className = 'text-xs font-mono text-[#f8b4c4] leading-relaxed break-all';
        output.textContent = 'LỖI HỆ THỐNG:\n' + e.toString();
    } finally {
        loading.classList.remove('flex');
        loading.classList.add('hidden');
    }
}
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

{# templates/chat.html #}
<div id="gua-ai-chat" class="fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-[200] flex flex-col items-end gap-4 font-sans reveal" style="transition-delay: 500ms;">

  {# ── CỬA SỔ CHAT ── #}
  <div id="chatbot-window" 
       class="hidden w-[340px] sm:w-[380px] bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] flex-col overflow-hidden origin-bottom-right transition-all duration-300 transform scale-95 opacity-0">
    
    {# Header #}

      <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
        <div class="relative flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 bg-white/10 rounded-full">
          <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-white" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M9.813 15.904L9 18.75l-.813-2.846a4.5 4.5 0 00-3.09-3.09L2.25 12l2.846-.813a4.5 4.5 0 003.09-3.09L9 5.25l.813 2.846a4.5 4.5 0 003.09 3.09l2.846.813-2.846.813a4.5 4.5 0 00-3.09 3.09zM18.259 8.715L18 9.75l-.259-1.035a3.375 3.375 0 00-2.455-2.456L14.25 6l1.036-.259a3.375 3.375 0 002.455-2.456L18 2.25l.259 1.035a3.375 3.375 0 002.456 2.456L21.75 6l-1.035.259a3.375 3.375 0 00-2.456 2.456z"/></svg>

        </div>
        <div>

          <p class="text-[10px] text-stone-400 font-medium mt-0.5">Sẵn sàng hỗ trợ & chốt đơn</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <button onclick="toggleBot()" class="text-stone-400 hover:text-white transition-colors p-1">
        <svg class="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"/></svg>
      </button>
    </div>

    {# Khu vực hiển thị tin nhắn #}
    <div id="chatbot-messages" class="h-[360px] overflow-y-auto p-5 flex flex-col gap-4 bg-stone-50/50 no-scrollbar">
      <div class="flex gap-2 w-full">
        <div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-stone-900 flex items-center justify-center text-white shrink-0 mt-1">
          <svg class="w-3 h-3" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3.75 13.5l10.5-11.25L12 10.5h8.25L9.75 21.75 12 13.5H3.75z"/></svg>
        </div>
        <div class="bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-4 py-3 shadow-sm text-sm text-stone-700 max-w-[85%] leading-relaxed">
          Xin chào! Mình là AI của GUA Maison. Mình có thể giúp bạn <b>tìm sản phẩm</b>, <b>tư vấn size</b> hoặc <b>phối đồ</b> nhé!
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    {# Input chat #}
    <div class="border-t border-stone-100 p-3 bg-white">
      <div class="flex items-center gap-2 bg-stone-50 border border-stone-200 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 focus-within:border-stone-400 focus-within:bg-white transition-colors shadow-inner">
        <input type="text" id="chatbot-input" placeholder="Hỏi AI về sản phẩm..." autocomplete="off"
               class="flex-1 text-sm bg-transparent outline-none placeholder:text-stone-400 text-stone-800"
               onkeypress="if(event.key === 'Enter') sendBotMessage()" />
        <button onclick="sendBotMessage()" class="w-8 h-8 bg-stone-900 text-white rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-stone-700 transition-colors shrink-0 shadow-sm">
          <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 12L3.269 3.126A59.768 59.768 0 0121.485 12 59.77 59.77 0 013.27 20.876L5.999 12zm0 0h7.5"/></svg>

<style>
  #chatbot-messages .product-card { animation: slideInUp 0.4s ease-out forwards; }
  @keyframes slideInUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
</style>

<script>
  function toggleBot() {
    const win = document.getElementById('chatbot-window');
    const isHidden = win.classList.contains('hidden');
    
    if (isHidden) {
      win.classList.remove('hidden');
      // Thêm timeout nhỏ để CSS Transition chạy mượt
      setTimeout(() => {
        win.classList.remove('scale-95', 'opacity-0');
        win.classList.add('flex', 'scale-100', 'opacity-100');
        document.getElementById('chatbot-input').focus();
      }, 10);
    } else {
      win.classList.remove('scale-100', 'opacity-100');
      win.classList.add('scale-95', 'opacity-0');
      setTimeout(() => {
        win.classList.add('hidden');
        win.classList.remove('flex');
      }, 300);
    }
  }

  async function sendBotMessage() {
    const input = document.getElementById('chatbot-input');
    const chatBox = document.getElementById('chatbot-messages');
    const msg = input.value.trim();
    if (!msg) return;

    const csrfToken = document.querySelector('input[name="csrf_token"]')?.value || '';

    // Bong bóng User
    chatBox.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', `
      <div class="flex gap-2 w-full justify-end">
        <div class="bg-stone-900 text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-4 py-2.5 shadow-sm text-sm max-w-[85%] break-words">
          ${msg}
        </div>
      </div>
    `);
    input.value = '';
    chatBox.scrollTop = chatBox.scrollHeight;

    // Loading indicator
    const typingId = 'typing-' + Date.now();
    chatBox.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', `
      <div id="${typingId}" class="flex gap-2 w-full">
        <div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-stone-200 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 mt-1">
          <span class="w-1 h-1 bg-stone-500 rounded-full animate-ping"></span>
        </div>
        <div class="bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-4 py-3 shadow-sm flex items-center gap-1">
          <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-stone-400 rounded-full animate-bounce" style="animation-delay:0ms"></span>
          <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-stone-400 rounded-full animate-bounce" style="animation-delay:150ms"></span>
          <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-stone-400 rounded-full animate-bounce" style="animation-delay:300ms"></span>
        </div>
      </div>
    `);
    chatBox.scrollTop = chatBox.scrollHeight;

    try {
      const res = await fetch('/api/bot', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-CSRFToken': csrfToken },
        body: JSON.stringify({ message: msg })
      });
      const data = await res.json();
      document.getElementById(typingId)?.remove();

      // Bong bóng Bot (Render HTML do Backend trả về)
      chatBox.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', `
        <div class="flex gap-2 w-full">
          <div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-stone-900 flex items-center justify-center text-white shrink-0 mt-1 shadow-sm">
            <svg class="w-3 h-3" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3.75 13.5l10.5-11.25L12 10.5h8.25L9.75 21.75 12 13.5H3.75z"/></svg>
          </div>
          <div class="bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-4 py-3 shadow-sm text-sm text-stone-800 max-w-[85%] leading-relaxed">
            ${data.reply}
          </div>
        </div>
      `);
    } catch {
      document.getElementById(typingId)?.remove();
      chatBox.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', `
        <div class="flex gap-2 w-full">
          <div class="bg-red-50 text-red-600 border border-red-100 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-4 py-3 text-sm">
            Hệ thống AI đang bảo trì. Vui lòng thử lại sau!
          </div>
        </div>
      `);
    }
    chatBox.scrollTop = chatBox.scrollHeight;
  }
</script>
</file>

{% with messages = get_flashed_messages(with_categories=true) %}
{% if messages %}

<div id="flash-container"
     aria-live="polite"
     aria-atomic="false"
     class="fixed top-20 right-4 sm:right-5 z-[300] flex flex-col gap-2.5
            w-[calc(100%-2rem)] sm:w-80 pointer-events-none">

  {% for category, message in messages %}

  {# Xác định loại thông báo #}
  {% if category == 'success' %}
    {% set icon_color  = 'bg-emerald-500' %}
    {% set border      = 'border-emerald-200' %}
    {% set bg          = 'bg-emerald-50' %}
    {% set label       = 'Thành công' %}
    {% set label_color = 'text-emerald-700' %}
    {% set msg_color   = 'text-emerald-900' %}
  {% elif category in ['danger', 'error'] %}
    {% set icon_color  = 'bg-red-500' %}
    {% set border      = 'border-red-200' %}
    {% set bg          = 'bg-red-50' %}
    {% set label       = 'Lỗi' %}
    {% set label_color = 'text-red-600' %}
    {% set msg_color   = 'text-red-900' %}
  {% elif category == 'warning' %}
    {% set icon_color  = 'bg-amber-400' %}
    {% set border      = 'border-amber-200' %}
    {% set bg          = 'bg-amber-50' %}
    {% set label       = 'Cảnh báo' %}
    {% set label_color = 'text-amber-700' %}
    {% set msg_color   = 'text-amber-900' %}
  {% else %}
    {% set icon_color  = 'bg-stone-500' %}
    {% set border      = 'border-stone-200' %}
    {% set bg          = 'bg-white' %}
    {% set label       = 'Thông báo' %}
    {% set label_color = 'text-stone-500' %}
    {% set msg_color   = 'text-stone-800' %}
  {% endif %}

  <div role="alert"
       class="flash-msg pointer-events-auto {{ bg }} border {{ border }} rounded-lg shadow-md
              px-4 py-3 flex items-start gap-3
              translate-x-0 opacity-100 transition-all duration-300">

    {# Dot màu trạng thái #}
    <span class="mt-0.5 w-2 h-2 rounded-full shrink-0 {{ icon_color }}
                 {% if category in ['danger', 'error'] %}animate-pulse{% endif %}"
          aria-hidden="true"></span>

    {# Nội dung #}
    <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
      <p class="text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider {{ label_color }} mb-0.5">
        {{ label }}
      </p>
      <p class="text-sm {{ msg_color }} leading-snug">
        {{ message }}
      </p>
    </div>

    {# Nút đóng #}
    <button onclick="dismissFlash(this)"
            aria-label="Đóng thông báo"
            class="shrink-0 text-stone-400 hover:text-stone-700 transition-colors p-0.5 -mt-0.5 -mr-0.5">
      <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true">
        <path d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"/>
      </svg>
    </button>

  </div>
  {% endfor %}

</div>

<style>
  @keyframes slideInRight {
    from { transform: translateX(110%); opacity: 0; }
    to   { transform: translateX(0);    opacity: 1; }
  }
  .flash-msg { animation: slideInRight 0.3s ease-out both; }
</style>

<script>
  function dismissFlash(btn) {
    const el = btn.closest('.flash-msg');
    slideOut(el);
  }

  function slideOut(el) {
    el.style.transform  = 'translateX(110%)';
    el.style.opacity    = '0';
    el.style.transition = 'transform 0.25s ease-in, opacity 0.25s ease-in';
    setTimeout(() => {
      el.remove();
      const container = document.getElementById('flash-container');
      if (container && !container.children.length) container.remove();
    }, 260);
  }

  // Tự đóng sau 5 giây
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    const msgs = document.querySelectorAll('.flash-msg');
    msgs.forEach((el, i) => {
      setTimeout(() => slideOut(el), 5000 + i * 200);
    });
  });
</script>

{% endif %}
{% endwith %}
</file>

<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/leaflet/1.9.4/leaflet.min.js"></script>
<script>
(function(){
  const LAT = 10.7739, LNG = 106.7025;
  const map = L.map('gua-map', {
    center: [LAT, LNG], zoom: 16,
    zoomControl: true, scrollWheelZoom: false,
    attributionControl: false
  });

  L.tileLayer('https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png', {
    maxZoom: 19
  }).addTo(map);

  const icon = L.divIcon({
    className: '', iconSize: [14,14], iconAnchor: [7,7], popupAnchor: [0,-14],
    html: '<div class="gua-marker"></div>'
  });

  L.marker([LAT, LNG], {icon})
    .addTo(map)
    .bindPopup(`
      <div style="color:#fff;min-width:180px">
        <p style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-style:italic;font-size:15px;margin-bottom:6px;color:#c9a97a">GUA Atelier</p>
        <p style="font-size:12px;line-height:1.6;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75)">15 Lê Lợi, Bến Nghé<br>Quận 1 · TP. HCM</p>
        <a href="https://maps.google.com/?q=10.7739,106.7025" target="_blank"
           style="display:inline-block;margin-top:12px;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#c9a97a;text-decoration:none;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,169,122,.4);padding-bottom:2px">
          Chỉ đường →
        </a>
      </div>
    `, {maxWidth: 240})
    .openPopup();
})();
</script>

<file path="app/utils/__init__.py">

<file path="app/utils/database.py">
# ===================================
# app/utils/database.py
# Kết nối Supabase - Singleton Pattern
# ===================================

import os
from supabase import create_client, Client
from dotenv import load_dotenv

load_dotenv()

_supabase_client: Client = None


def get_db() -> Client:
    """
    Trả về Supabase client dùng Singleton pattern.
    Chỉ tạo kết nối 1 lần, tái sử dụng cho mọi request.
    """
    global _supabase_client

    if _supabase_client is None:
        url = os.environ.get("SUPABASE_URL")
        key = os.environ.get("SUPABASE_KEY")

        if not url or not key:
            raise ValueError(
                "❌ SUPABASE_URL và SUPABASE_KEY chưa được cấu hình trong .env"
            )

        _supabase_client = create_client(url, key)
        print("✅ Supabase connected!")

    return _supabase_client
</file>

<file path="app/utils/security.py">
"""
app/utils/security.py
=====================
Hash & verify password dùng bcrypt.
Không lưu plain-text password vào DB.
"""

import bcrypt


def hash_password(plain: str) -> str:
    """Trả về chuỗi hash của password (bcrypt, cost=12)."""
    return bcrypt.hashpw(plain.encode("utf-8"), bcrypt.gensalt(rounds=12)).decode("utf-8")


def verify_password(plain: str, hashed: str) -> bool:
    """So sánh plain-text với hash, trả về True nếu khớp."""
    return bcrypt.checkpw(plain.encode("utf-8"), hashed.encode("utf-8"))
</file>

<file path="app/utils/supabase_client.py">
"""
app/utils/supabase_client.py
============================
Singleton Supabase client – import ở bất kỳ đâu cũng dùng chung 1 instance.
"""

import os
from supabase import create_client, Client
from dotenv import load_dotenv

load_dotenv()

_client: Client | None = None


def get_supabase() -> Client:
    """Trả về Supabase client (khởi tạo 1 lần duy nhất)."""
    global _client
    if _client is None:
        url = os.environ.get("SUPABASE_URL", "")
        key = os.environ.get("SUPABASE_KEY", "")
        if not url or not key:
            raise EnvironmentError("❌ Thiếu SUPABASE_URL hoặc SUPABASE_KEY trong .env")
        _client = create_client(url, key)
    return _client
</file>
