# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
#  PRIVATE HELPERS
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

_PLACEHOLDER_IMG = "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1441986300917-64674bd600d8?w=500&q=80"


def _hf_headers() -> dict[str, str]:
    token = current_app.config.get("HF_TOKEN", "")
    return {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"} if token else {}


# ── [FIX #1] Forward ảnh đúng đến HF ─────────────────────────────
def _analyze_image(image_b64: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
    """
    POST base64 image → HF /analyze-style.
    BUG CŨ: field gửi lên là "image" nhưng đôi khi có data-URI prefix
            → HF báo lỗi decode.  FIX: strip prefix trước khi gửi.
    """
    engine_url = current_app.config.get("AI_ENGINE_URL", "")
    if not engine_url:
        logger.warning("[GUA AI] AI_ENGINE_URL chưa cấu hình → bỏ qua phân tích ảnh")
        return None

    # Strip data-URI prefix nếu frontend gửi kèm (vd: "data:image/jpeg;base64,...")
    if "," in image_b64:
        image_b64 = image_b64.split(",", 1)[1]

    try:
        resp = requests.post(
            f"{engine_url.rstrip('/')}/analyze-style",
            json={"image": image_b64},  # HF nhận field "image"
            headers=_hf_headers(),
            timeout=12,
        )
        if resp.status_code == 200:
            result = resp.json()
            logger.info(
                "[GUA AI] HF analyze-style OK → shape=%s vibe=%s conf=%.2f",
                result.get("body", {}).get("shape"),
                result.get("suggested_vibe"),
                result.get("confidence", 0),
            )
            return result
        logger.warning("[GUA AI] HF /analyze-style trả về HTTP %s", resp.status_code)
    except requests.exceptions.Timeout:
        logger.warning("[GUA AI] /analyze-style timeout — bỏ qua, dùng vibe của user")
    except Exception:
        logger.exception("[GUA AI] Lỗi không xác định khi gọi /analyze-style")
    return None


def _body_score_bonus(body: dict | None, vibe: str) -> int:
    """±4 điểm dựa trên body-shape × vibe affinity."""
    if not body:
        return 0
    shape = body.get("shape", "rectangle")
    affinity = _SHAPE_AFFINITY.get(shape, [0.85] * 4)
    try:
        idx = _VIBE_ORDER.index(vibe)
        return round((affinity[idx] - 0.80) * 20)
    except (ValueError, IndexError):
        return 0


# ── [FIX #2] Supabase field mapping chuẩn ─────────────────────────
_supabase_cache: dict[str, tuple[float, list]] = {}  # {vibe: (timestamp, items)}
_CACHE_TTL = 60  # giây


def _fetch_supabase(vibe: str) -> list[dict]:
    """
    Query Supabase theo vibe.  Có cache 60 giây để tránh N+1 calls.

    ProductModel.get_all() trả về dict:
      {
        "items": [
          {
            "id": uuid,
            "name": str,
            "price": float,
            "slug": str,
            "description": str,
            "images": [{"url": str, "is_primary": bool}, ...],
            "categories": {"name": str, "slug": str},   ← JOIN
          },
          ...
        ],
        "total": int
      }
    """
    now = time.monotonic()
    cached = _supabase_cache.get(vibe)
    if cached and (now - cached[0]) < _CACHE_TTL:
        logger.debug("[GUA AI] Dùng cache Supabase cho vibe=%s", vibe)
        return cached[1]

    collected: list[dict] = []
    for slug in _VIBE_SLUGS.get(vibe, [vibe]):
        try:
            result = ProductModel.get_all(page=1, per_page=20, category=slug)
            items = result.get("items", [])
            collected.extend(items)
            logger.info("[GUA AI] Supabase slug=%s → %d sản phẩm", slug, len(items))
        except Exception:
            logger.exception("[GUA AI] Lỗi query Supabase slug=%s", slug)
        if len(collected) >= 8:
            break

    _supabase_cache[vibe] = (now, collected)
    return collected


def _normalise_product(
    product: dict[str, Any],
    rank: int,
    vibe: str,
    body: dict | None,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """
    Chuyển raw Supabase row → card dict chuẩn cho frontend.

    FIX: images field là list[dict], phải dùng next() để lấy is_primary.
         categories field là dict với key "name".
    """
    # ── Match score ──
    base = max(70, 98 - rank * 5) + random.randint(-2, 2) + _body_score_bonus(body, vibe)
    score = max(70, min(99, base))

    # ── Ảnh sản phẩm ── [FIX: kiểm tra type trước khi iterate]
    imgs = product.get("images") or []
    primary = next(
        (img for img in imgs if isinstance(img, dict) and img.get("is_primary")),
        imgs[0] if imgs else {},
    )
    img_url = (primary.get("url") or primary.get("image_url") or _PLACEHOLDER_IMG) if primary else _PLACEHOLDER_IMG

    # ── Category name ── [FIX: categories là dict, không phải str]
    cat_field = product.get("categories") or product.get("category") or {}
    if isinstance(cat_field, dict):
        cat_name = cat_field.get("name") or cat_field.get("label") or "—"
    else:
        cat_name = str(cat_field) or "—"

    # ── Badge ──
    badge_map = {0: "Best Match", 1: "Top Pick"}
    badge = product.get("badge") or badge_map.get(rank)

    # ── Reason / mô tả ngắn ──
    reason = (product.get("description") or "")[:90]

    return {
        "id": str(product.get("id", "")),
        "name": product.get("name", "Sản phẩm GUA"),
        "category": cat_name,
        "price": int(product.get("price", 0)),
        "match_score": score,
        "reason": reason,
        "image": img_url,
        "badge": badge,
        "slug": product.get("slug", ""),
    }


def _build_recommendations(
    vibe: str,
    body: dict | None,
) -> tuple[list[dict], str]:
    """
    Trả về (cards[4], source).
    source = "supabase" | "mock"
    """
    real = _fetch_supabase(vibe)

    if real:
        random.shuffle(real)
        cards = [_normalise_product(p, i, vibe, body) for i, p in enumerate(real[:4])]
        cards.sort(key=lambda x: x["match_score"], reverse=True)
        cards[0]["badge"] = "Best Match"
        logger.info("[GUA AI] Trả về %d sản phẩm THẬT từ Supabase cho vibe=%s", len(cards), vibe)
        return cards, "supabase"

    # Fallback mock
    logger.warning("[GUA AI] Supabase không có data → dùng mock cho vibe=%s", vibe)
    mock = [dict(p) for p in _MOCK[vibe]]
    random.shuffle(mock[1:])
    bonus = _body_score_bonus(body, vibe)
    for p in mock:
        p["match_score"] = max(70, min(99, p["match_score"] + bonus))
    return mock[:4], "mock"


def _weighted_overall_score(cards: list[dict]) -> int:
    """
    Tính điểm tổng thể: card đầu (Best Match) có trọng số cao hơn.
    Công thức: 50% item[0] + 30% item[1] + 20% trung bình còn lại
    """
    if not cards:
        return 0
    scores = [c["match_score"] for c in cards]
    if len(scores) == 1:
        return scores[0]
    rest_avg = sum(scores[2:]) / max(len(scores[2:]), 1) if len(scores) > 2 else scores[-1]
    return round(0.50 * scores[0] + 0.30 * scores[1] + 0.20 * rest_avg)

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
#  ROUTES
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


@ai_bp.route("/styling-lab")
def styling_lab_page():
    return render_template("features/styling_lab.html")


@ai_bp.route("/api/recommend_outfit", methods=["POST"])
def recommend_outfit():
    """
    POST /api/recommend_outfit

    Request JSON:
      {
        "vibe":       "streetwear" | "minimalist" | "techwear" | "smart_casual",
        "image_b64":  "<base64 có hoặc không có data-URI prefix>" | null,
        "product_id": "<uuid>" | null   (anchor – reserved)
      }

    Response JSON:
      {
        "status":          "success",
        "vibe":            str,
        "source":          "supabase" | "mock",
        "image_analyzed":  bool,
        "body_data":       {shape, height, build} | null,
        "suggested_vibe":  str | null,
        "auto_vibe":       bool,           ← true khi AI override vibe của user
        "style_profile":   {label, desc, color, icon},
        "total_look_price": int,
        "overall_match":   int,
        "data":            [...4 cards...]
      }
    """
    try:
        payload = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
        vibe = payload.get("vibe", "streetwear")
        image_b64 = payload.get("image_b64")  # [FIX] nhận từ payload
        # anchor_id = payload.get("product_id")         # reserved

        if vibe not in STYLE_PROFILES:
            vibe = "streetwear"

        user_vibe = vibe  # lưu để so sánh sau

        # ── ① Phân tích ảnh (tuỳ chọn) ──────────────────────────
        body_data: dict | None = None
        suggested_vibe: str | None = None
        image_analyzed: bool = False
        auto_vibe: bool = False

        if image_b64:
            logger.info("[GUA AI] Có ảnh từ user → gửi đến HF analyze-style")
            ai_result = _analyze_image(image_b64)
            if ai_result and ai_result.get("status") != "error":
                body_data = ai_result.get("body")
                suggested_vibe = ai_result.get("suggested_vibe")
                confidence = float(ai_result.get("confidence", 0))
                image_analyzed = True

                if suggested_vibe in STYLE_PROFILES and confidence >= 0.75:
                    vibe = suggested_vibe
                    auto_vibe = True
                    logger.info(
                        "[GUA AI] Vibe tự động → %s (conf=%.2f) | user muốn: %s",
                        vibe, confidence, user_vibe,
                    )
            else:
                logger.warning("[GUA AI] HF không khả dụng → giữ vibe của user: %s", vibe)

        # ── ② Xây dựng gợi ý trang phục ─────────────────────────
        recommendations, source = _build_recommendations(vibe, body_data)

        return jsonify({
            "status": "success",
            "vibe": vibe,
            "source": source,
            "image_analyzed": image_analyzed,
            "body_data": body_data,
            "suggested_vibe": suggested_vibe,
            "auto_vibe": auto_vibe,
            "style_profile": STYLE_PROFILES[vibe],
            "total_look_price": sum(p["price"] for p in recommendations),
            "overall_match": _weighted_overall_score(recommendations),
            "data": recommendations,
        })

    except Exception:
        logger.exception("[GUA AI] recommend_outfit lỗi không xử lý được")
        return jsonify({
            "status": "error",
            "message": "Không thể xử lý yêu cầu. Vui lòng thử lại.",
        }), 500
</file>

<file path="app/middleware/auth_required.py">
"""
app/middleware/auth_required.py
"""

import logging
from functools import wraps
from flask import session, redirect, url_for, flash, request, abort
from typing import Callable, Any
from app.utils.supabase_client import get_supabase

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


def _is_admin(user_id: str) -> bool:
    """
    Kiểm tra quyền admin bằng 2 bước riêng biệt.
    Tránh lỗi Supabase client khi join bảng có tenant_id nullable.
    """
    try:
        db = get_supabase()

        # Bước 1: Lấy role_id của user
        ur_res = db.table("user_roles").select("role_id").eq("user_id", user_id).execute()
        if not ur_res.data:
            return False

        role_ids = [row["role_id"] for row in ur_res.data]

        # Bước 2: Kiểm tra trong bảng roles có tên 'admin' không
        roles_res = (
            db.table("roles")
            .select("name")
            .in_("id", role_ids)
            .execute()
        )
        if not roles_res.data:
            return False

        return any(row["name"] == "admin" for row in roles_res.data)

    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"[RBAC Critical] Lỗi xác thực quyền cho user_id={user_id}: {e}")
        return False


def login_required(f: Callable) -> Callable:

    @wraps(f)
    def decorated(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any) -> Any:
        if "user_id" not in session:
            flash("Vui lòng đăng nhập để tiếp tục.", "warning")
            return redirect(url_for("auth.login", next=request.url))
        return f(*args, **kwargs)

    return decorated


def admin_required(f: Callable) -> Callable:

    @wraps(f)
    def decorated(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any) -> Any:
        user_id = session.get("user_id")

        if not user_id:
            flash("Vui lòng đăng nhập tài khoản quản trị.", "warning")
            return redirect(url_for("auth.login", next=request.url))

        # Ưu tiên dùng role trong session (đã được verify lúc login)
        # Nhưng vẫn double-check với DB để chống giả mạo session
        session_role = session.get("role")
        if session_role == "admin":
            # Session nói là admin → tin tưởng, không query DB thêm (hiệu năng)
            return f(*args, **kwargs)

        # Session không phải admin → query DB để chắc chắn
        if _is_admin(user_id):
            # Cập nhật lại session nếu role đã được thay đổi trong DB
            session["role"] = "admin"
            return f(*args, **kwargs)

        flash("Bạn không có quyền truy cập khu vực này.", "danger")
        if request.method == "POST" or request.is_json:
            return abort(403)
        return redirect(url_for("products.index"))

    return decorated
</file>

                  class="flex-1 relative flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-3 px-2 rounded-sm border transition-all group overflow-hidden
                  {% if order.status == 'confirmed' %} bg-blue-600 text-white border-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700
                  {% elif order.status in ['packed','shipped','shipping','delivered','completed'] %} bg-white text-emerald-600 border-emerald-200 cursor-default
                  {% else %} bg-white text-neutral-400 border-neutral-200 cursor-not-allowed {% endif %}">
            <span class="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest z-10 btn-text flex items-center gap-2">
              {% if order.status in ['packed','shipped','shipping','delivered','completed'] %}<i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i> Đã đóng gói{% else %}2. Đóng gói{% endif %}
            </span>
            <div class="spinner hidden absolute inset-0 bg-blue-600 items-center justify-center z-20">
              <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-notch fa-spin text-white"></i>
            </div>
          </button>

          {# Nút 3: Vận đơn #}
          <button id="btn-fulfill" onclick="openFulfillModal()" {% if order.status != 'packed' %}disabled{% endif %}
                  class="flex-1 relative flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-3 px-2 rounded-sm border transition-all group overflow-hidden
                  {% if order.status == 'packed' %} bg-emerald-600 text-white border-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-700
                  {% elif order.status in ['shipped','shipping','delivered','completed'] %} bg-white text-emerald-600 border-emerald-200 cursor-default
                  {% else %} bg-white text-neutral-400 border-neutral-200 cursor-not-allowed {% endif %}">
            <span class="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest z-10 btn-text flex items-center gap-2">
              {% if order.status in ['shipped','shipping','delivered','completed'] %}<i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i> Đã bắn đơn{% else %}3. Tạo vận đơn{% endif %}
            </span>
          </button>
        </div>

        {% if not can_process and order.status == 'pending' %}
        <div class="mb-6 p-4 bg-red-50 border border-red-100 rounded-sm flex items-start gap-3 no-print">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation text-red-500 mt-0.5"></i>
          <div>
            <p class="text-[10px] font-bold text-red-600 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">Chờ xác nhận thanh toán</p>
            <p class="text-[11px] text-red-500">Đơn hàng thanh toán qua {{ order.payment_method }} nhưng chưa ghi nhận được tiền. Vui lòng xác nhận thu tiền để tiếp tục.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        {% endif %}

        {% if order.shipments and order.shipments.tracking_code %}
        <div class="p-4 bg-[#f8f8f8] border border-neutral-200 rounded-sm flex items-center justify-between no-print">
          <div>
            <p class="text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-neutral-400 mb-1">Mã vận đơn</p>
            <p class="text-sm font-black text-black font-mono tracking-widest">{{ order.shipments.tracking_code }}</p>
          </div>
          <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 bg-white border border-neutral-200 rounded-sm text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-black">
            {{ provider_info.name if provider_info.name else order.shipments.provider | upper }}
          </span>
        </div>
        {% endif %}
      </div>
      {% endif %}

      {# ─── 2. DANH SÁCH SẢN PHẨM ─── #}
      <div class="bg-white rounded-sm shadow-sm border border-neutral-200 overflow-hidden print-box">
        <div class="px-5 py-4 border-b border-neutral-100 flex justify-between items-center bg-[#f8f8f8]">
          <h3 class="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-black">Sản phẩm đã đặt</h3>
          <span class="text-[9px] font-bold text-neutral-500 uppercase tracking-widest">{{ order.order_items|length }} sản phẩm</span>
        </div>

        <div class="divide-y divide-neutral-100">
          {% set subtotal = namespace(value=0) %}
          {% for item in order.order_items %}
          {% set item_total = item.unit_price * item.quantity %}
          {% set subtotal.value = subtotal.value + item_total %}
          
          <div class="p-5 flex items-start sm:items-center gap-4 hover:bg-neutral-50 transition-colors">
            <div class="w-16 h-20 bg-[#f8f8f8] rounded-sm overflow-hidden shrink-0 border border-neutral-200">
              <img src="{{ item.get('products', {}).get('thumbnail_url') or 'https://placehold.co/150x200' }}" class="w-full h-full object-cover mix-blend-multiply">
            </div>
            <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
              <p class="text-xs font-bold text-black uppercase truncate mb-1.5">{{ item.get('products', {}).get('name', 'Sản phẩm (Đã xóa)') }}</p>
              
              {% set variant = item.get('product_variants') or {} %}
              <div class="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 mb-1.5">
                {% if variant.get('size') %}
                <span class="text-[9px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 bg-neutral-100 text-black rounded-sm uppercase">Size {{ variant.get('size') }}</span>
                {% endif %}
                {% if variant.get('color_name') %}
                <span class="text-[9px] font-bold text-neutral-500 uppercase flex items-center gap-1">
                  <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full border border-neutral-300" style="background-color: {{ variant.get('color_hex', '#e7e5e4') }}"></span>
                  {{ variant.get('color_name') }}
                </span>
                {% endif %}
              </div>
              <p class="text-[11px] font-medium text-neutral-500">{{ '{:,.0f}'.format(item.unit_price) }} ₫ <span class="mx-1">x</span> {{ item.quantity }}</p>
            </div>
            <div class="text-right shrink-0">
              <p class="text-xs font-black text-black tabular-nums">{{ '{:,.0f}'.format(item_total) }} ₫</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          {% endfor %}
        </div>

        {# CHI PHÍ #}
        <div class="p-5 bg-[#f8f8f8] border-t border-neutral-200">
          <div class="max-w-xs ml-auto space-y-2.5">
            <div class="flex justify-between items-center text-[11px]">
              <span class="font-bold text-neutral-500 uppercase tracking-widest">Tạm tính</span>
              <span class="font-bold text-black tabular-nums">{{ '{:,.0f}'.format(subtotal.value) }} ₫</span>
            </div>
            <div class="flex justify-between items-center text-[11px]">
              <span class="font-bold text-neutral-500 uppercase tracking-widest">Vận chuyển</span>
              <span class="font-bold text-black tabular-nums">{{ '{:,.0f}'.format(order.shipping_fee or 0) }} ₫</span>
            </div>
            {% if order.discount_amount and order.discount_amount > 0 %}
            <div class="flex justify-between items-center text-[11px]">
              <span class="font-bold text-red-500 uppercase tracking-widest">Giảm giá</span>
              <span class="font-bold text-red-500 tabular-nums">-{{ '{:,.0f}'.format(order.discount_amount) }} ₫</span>
            </div>
            {% endif %}
            <div class="pt-3 mt-1 border-t border-neutral-200 flex justify-between items-end">
              <span class="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-black">Tổng thu</span>
              <span class="text-xl font-black text-emerald-600 tabular-nums">{{ '{:,.0f}'.format(order.total_amount) }} ₫</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    {# ══════════════════════════════
       CỘT PHẢI (4/12): KHÁCH HÀNG & THANH TOÁN
       ══════════════════════════════ #}
    <div class="lg:col-span-4 space-y-6">

      {# ─── LOGIC FALLBACK LẤY THÔNG TIN KHÁCH HÀNG ─── #}
      {% set c_name = order.customer_name %}
      {% if not c_name and order.users %}{% set c_name = order.users.full_name %}{% endif %}
      {% if not c_name and order.shipping_address %}{% set c_name = order.shipping_address.get('full_name') %}{% endif %}
      
      {% set c_phone = order.customer_phone %}
      {% if not c_phone and order.users %}{% set c_phone = order.users.phone %}{% endif %}
      {% if not c_phone and order.shipping_address %}{% set c_phone = order.shipping_address.get('phone') %}{% endif %}

      <div class="bg-white rounded-sm p-6 shadow-sm border border-neutral-200 print-box">
        <h3 class="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-black mb-5">Khách hàng</h3>
        <div class="flex items-center gap-4 mb-5">
          <div class="w-10 h-10 bg-black text-white rounded-sm flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold uppercase shrink-0">
            {{ (c_name or '?')[0] }}
          </div>
          <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
            <p class="text-xs font-bold text-black uppercase truncate">{{ c_name or 'Khách lẻ' }}</p>
            <p class="text-[10px] font-bold text-neutral-400 mt-1 tracking-widest">{{ c_phone or '---' }}</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="pt-4 border-t border-neutral-100">
          <p class="text-[9px] font-bold text-neutral-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1.5 flex items-center gap-1.5">
             <i class="fa-solid fa-location-dot"></i> Địa chỉ giao hàng
          </p>
          {% if order.source == 'pos' %}
            <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-black bg-[#f8f8f8] p-3 rounded-sm border border-neutral-200 text-center uppercase tracking-widest">
              Giao dịch tại quầy (POS)
            </p>
          {% elif order.shipping_address %}
            <p class="text-[11px] font-medium text-black leading-relaxed">
              {{ order.shipping_address.get('address','') }}<br>
              {{ order.shipping_address.get('district','') }}, {{ order.shipping_address.get('city','') }}
            </p>
          {% else %}
             <p class="text-[11px] text-neutral-400 italic">Không có địa chỉ</p>
          {% endif %}
        </div>
      </div>

      {# ─── THANH TOÁN ─── #}
      <div class="bg-white rounded-sm p-6 shadow-sm border border-neutral-200 print-box">
        <h3 class="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-black mb-5">Thanh toán</h3>
        <div class="space-y-3">
          <div class="flex justify-between items-center p-3 bg-[#f8f8f8] rounded-sm border border-neutral-100">
            <span class="text-[9px] font-bold text-neutral-500 uppercase tracking-widest">Phương thức</span>
            <span class="text-[10px] font-black text-black uppercase tracking-widest">{{ order.payment_method }}</span>
          </div>
          
          <div class="flex justify-between items-center p-3 {% if order.payment_status == 'paid' %}bg-emerald-50 border-emerald-200{% else %}bg-amber-50 border-amber-200{% endif %} rounded-sm border">
            <span class="text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest {% if order.payment_status == 'paid' %}text-emerald-700{% else %}text-amber-700{% endif %}">Trạng thái</span>
            
            {% if order.payment_status == 'paid' %}
            <span class="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-emerald-600 flex items-center gap-1.5">
              <i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i> Đã thu tiền
            </span>
            {% else %}
            <span class="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-amber-600 flex items-center gap-1.5">
              <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-amber-500 animate-pulse"></span> Chờ thanh toán
            </span>
            {% endif %}
          </div>

          {% if order.status != 'cancelled' and order.payment_status != 'paid' and order.source != 'pos' %}
            <div class="pt-3 no-print">
              <form action="{{ url_for('admin.update_payment_status', order_id=order.id) }}" method="POST"
                    onsubmit="return confirm('Xác nhận đã thu tiền đơn này?')">
                <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
                <input type="hidden" name="payment_status" value="paid">
                <button type="submit" class="w-full py-3 bg-black text-white rounded-sm text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] hover:bg-neutral-800 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                  Xác nhận đã thu tiền
                </button>
              </form>
            </div>
          {% endif %}
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

{# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   MODAL: FULFILLMENT — CHỌN HÃNG VẬN CHUYỂN
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ #}
{% if order.status == 'packed' %}
<div id="modal-fulfill" class="fixed inset-0 z-50 hidden items-center justify-center p-4">
  <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm" onclick="closeFulfillModal()"></div>
  <div class="relative bg-white rounded-sm shadow-2xl p-6 max-w-sm w-full">
    <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-5 border-b border-neutral-100 pb-4">
      <h3 class="text-xs font-black text-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em]">Giao Vận Chuyển</h3>
      <button onclick="closeFulfillModal()" class="text-neutral-400 hover:text-black"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark text-lg"></i></button>
    </div>

    <div class="space-y-3 mb-6">
      {% for p in providers %}
      <label class="block cursor-pointer group">
        <input type="radio" name="provider" value="{{ p.id }}" class="peer sr-only" {% if p.id == 'mock' %}checked{% endif %}>
        <div class="p-4 border border-neutral-200 rounded-sm flex items-center gap-4 peer-checked:border-black peer-checked:bg-[#f8f8f8] transition-all">
          <div class="text-xl w-8 flex justify-center text-neutral-400 peer-checked:text-black">
            <i class="fa-solid {{ p.icon.replace('fa-solid ', '') }}"></i>
          </div>

            <p class="font-bold text-[11px] text-black uppercase">{{ p.name or p.label }}</p>

            <div class="w-2 h-2 bg-black rounded-full opacity-0 peer-checked:opacity-100"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </label>
      {% endfor %}
    </div>

    <button onclick="submitFulfill()" id="btnSubmitFulfill" class="relative w-full bg-black text-white py-3 rounded-sm text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-neutral-800 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center">
      <span class="btn-text">Xác nhận tạo vận đơn</span>
      <div class="spinner hidden absolute inset-0 bg-black items-center justify-center z-20">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-notch fa-spin text-white"></i>
      </div>

{# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   MODAL: HỦY ĐƠN HÀNG
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ #}
{% if order.status in ['pending', 'confirmed', 'packed'] %}
<div id="modal-cancel" class="fixed inset-0 z-50 hidden items-center justify-center p-4">
  <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm" onclick="closeCancelModal()"></div>
  <div class="relative bg-white rounded-sm shadow-2xl max-w-sm w-full p-6">
    <div class="text-center mb-6">
      <i class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation text-3xl text-red-500 mb-3"></i>
      <h2 class="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-black mb-2">Hủy đơn hàng</h2>
      <p class="text-[10px] font-bold text-neutral-500 uppercase tracking-widest">Hành động này không thể hoàn tác.</p>
    </div>
    <div id="cancel-error" class="hidden mb-4 p-3 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 text-[9px] font-bold text-red-600 text-center uppercase tracking-widest rounded-sm"></div>
    <div class="flex gap-3">
      <button onclick="closeCancelModal()" class="flex-1 py-3 bg-neutral-100 hover:bg-neutral-200 text-black font-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest rounded-sm transition-colors">Đóng</button>
      <button id="btn-confirm-cancel" onclick="confirmCancelAdmin()" class="flex-1 py-3 bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white font-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest rounded-sm transition-colors relative flex justify-center">
        <span class="btn-text">Hủy đơn</span>
        <div class="spinner hidden absolute inset-0 bg-red-600 items-center justify-center z-20">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-notch fa-spin"></i>
        </div>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% endif %}

<style>
  @media print {
    body { background: white !important; }
    .no-print, button, .sticky { display: none !important; }
    .lg\:col-span-8, .lg\:col-span-4 { width: 100% !important; grid-column: span 12 / span 12 !important; }
    .print-box { box-shadow: none !important; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5 !important; margin-bottom: 20px !important; }
  }
  .no-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
</style>

<script>
const ORDER_ID = "{{ order.id }}";

async function processOrder(action, btnElement) {
  if (btnElement.disabled) return;
  if (!confirm("Xác nhận chuyển bước?")) return;

  const btnText = btnElement.querySelector('.btn-text');
  const spinner = btnElement.querySelector('.spinner');
  btnText.classList.add('opacity-0');
  spinner.classList.remove('hidden');
  spinner.classList.add('flex');
  btnElement.disabled = true;

  try {
    const res = await fetch(`/admin/orders/${ORDER_ID}/${action}`, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", "X-CSRFToken": "{{ csrf_token() }}" }
    });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) {
      window.location.reload();
    } else {
      alert("❌ " + data.message);
      _resetBtn(btnElement);
    }
  } catch (e) {
    alert("Lỗi máy chủ.");
    _resetBtn(btnElement);
  }
}

function _resetBtn(btn) {
  const btnText = btn.querySelector('.btn-text');
  const spinner = btn.querySelector('.spinner');
  if (btnText) btnText.classList.remove('opacity-0');
  if (spinner) { spinner.classList.add('hidden'); spinner.classList.remove('flex'); }
  btn.disabled = false;
}

function openFulfillModal() { const m = document.getElementById('modal-fulfill'); if (m) { m.classList.remove('hidden'); m.classList.add('flex'); } }
function closeFulfillModal() { const m = document.getElementById('modal-fulfill'); if (m) { m.classList.add('hidden'); m.classList.remove('flex'); } }

async function submitFulfill() {
  const selectedInput = document.querySelector('input[name="provider"]:checked');
  if (!selectedInput) return;
  const provider = selectedInput.value;
  const btn = document.getElementById('btnSubmitFulfill');
  btn.disabled = true;
  btn.querySelector('.btn-text').classList.add('hidden');
  btn.querySelector('.spinner').classList.remove('hidden');
  btn.querySelector('.spinner').classList.add('flex');

  try {
    const res = await fetch(`/admin/orders/${ORDER_ID}/fulfill`, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", "X-CSRFToken": "{{ csrf_token() }}" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ provider })
    });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) { window.location.reload(); } 
    else { alert("❌ " + data.message); _resetFulfillBtn(btn); }
  } catch (e) { alert("Lỗi API."); _resetFulfillBtn(btn); }
}

function _resetFulfillBtn(btn) {
  btn.disabled = false;
  btn.querySelector('.btn-text').classList.remove('hidden');
  const spinner = btn.querySelector('.spinner');
  spinner.classList.add('hidden'); spinner.classList.remove('flex');
}

function openCancelModal() { const m = document.getElementById("modal-cancel"); if (m) { m.classList.remove("hidden"); m.classList.add("flex"); } }
function closeCancelModal() { const m = document.getElementById("modal-cancel"); if (m) { m.classList.add("hidden"); m.classList.remove("flex"); } }

async function confirmCancelAdmin() {
  const btn = document.getElementById("btn-confirm-cancel");
  const err = document.getElementById("cancel-error");
  btn.disabled = true;
  btn.querySelector('.btn-text').classList.add('hidden');
  btn.querySelector('.spinner').classList.remove('hidden');
  btn.querySelector('.spinner').classList.add('flex');

  try {
    const res = await fetch(`/profile/orders/${ORDER_ID}/cancel`, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "X-Requested-With": "XMLHttpRequest", "X-CSRFToken": "{{ csrf_token() }}" }
    });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) { window.location.reload(); } 
    else { err.textContent = data.message; err.classList.remove("hidden"); _resetCancelBtn(btn); }
  } catch (e) { err.textContent = "Lỗi mạng!"; err.classList.remove("hidden"); _resetCancelBtn(btn); }
}

function _resetCancelBtn(btn) {
  btn.disabled = false;
  btn.querySelector('.btn-text').classList.remove('hidden');
  const spinner = btn.querySelector('.spinner');
  spinner.classList.add('hidden'); spinner.classList.remove('flex');
}
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

  <div class="mx-auto grid w-full max-w-[1180px] grid-cols-1 overflow-hidden border border-stone-300 bg-white shadow-[0_22px_70px_rgba(20,18,14,0.1)] rounded-sm lg:grid-cols-[1.1fr_0.9fr]">
    
    {# ── CỘT TRÁI: HÌNH ẢNH (CHỈ HIỆN DESKTOP) ── #}

        <div class="grid grid-cols-3 border-y border-white/20 text-center">

            <p class="mt-1 text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.25em] text-white/60">Lookbook</p>
          </div>
          <div class="border-x border-white/20 py-5">
            <p class="font-display text-2xl xl:text-3xl">24</p>
            <p class="mt-1 text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.25em] text-white/60">Orders</p>
          </div>

              </a>

                  <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M2.036 12.322a1.012 1.012 0 0 1 0-.639C3.423 7.51 7.36 4.5 12 4.5c4.638 0 8.573 3.007 9.963 7.178.07.207.07.431 0 .639C20.577 16.49 16.64 19.5 12 19.5c-4.638 0-8.573-3.007-9.963-7.178Z" />
                  <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15 12a3 3 0 1 1-6 0 3 3 0 0 1 6 0Z" />
                </svg>
              </button>

          </div>

                  class="group flex h-12 sm:h-14 w-full items-center justify-center gap-3 rounded-sm bg-stone-950 px-5 text-[10px] sm:text-[11px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.25em] text-white shadow-[0_10px_30px_rgba(12,10,9,0.2)] transition-all hover:bg-[#2a251d] active:scale-[0.98]">

<script>
  function togglePasswordVisibility() {
    const pwdInput = document.getElementById('password');
    const eyeIcon = document.getElementById('eye-icon');
    
    if (pwdInput.type === 'password') {
      pwdInput.type = 'text';
      eyeIcon.innerHTML = `
        <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3.98 8.223A10.477 10.477 0 0 0 1.934 12C3.226 16.338 7.244 19.5 12 19.5c.993 0 1.953-.138 2.863-.395M6.228 6.228A10.451 10.451 0 0 1 12 4.5c4.756 0 8.773 3.162 10.065 7.498a10.522 10.522 0 0 1-4.293 5.774M6.228 6.228 3 3m3.228 3.228 3.65 3.65m7.894 7.894L21 21m-3.228-3.228-3.65-3.65m0 0a3 3 0 1 0-4.243-4.243m4.242 4.242L9.88 9.88" />
      `;
    } else {
      pwdInput.type = 'password';
      eyeIcon.innerHTML = `
        <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M2.036 12.322a1.012 1.012 0 0 1 0-.639C3.423 7.51 7.36 4.5 12 4.5c4.638 0 8.573 3.007 9.963 7.178.07.207.07.431 0 .639C20.577 16.49 16.64 19.5 12 19.5c-4.638 0-8.573-3.007-9.963-7.178Z" />
        <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15 12a3 3 0 1 1-6 0 3 3 0 0 1 6 0Z" />
      `;
    }
  }
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

<style>
  /* Hiệu ứng Reveal mượt mà */
  .reveal { opacity: 0; animation: revealUp 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) forwards; }
  @keyframes revealUp { 
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); } 
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } 
  }
</style>

<script>
  // Script xử lý Ẩn/Hiện mật khẩu
  function togglePassword(inputId, iconId) {
    const input = document.getElementById(inputId);
    const icon = document.getElementById(iconId);
    
    if (input.type === 'password') {
      input.type = 'text';
      icon.classList.remove('fa-eye');
      icon.classList.add('fa-eye-slash');
    } else {
      input.type = 'password';
      icon.classList.remove('fa-eye-slash');
      icon.classList.add('fa-eye');
    }
  }
</script>
{% endblock %}

            <span class="absolute top-4 left-4 text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] bg-white text-black px-3 py-1.5 shadow-sm pointer-events-none">
              Mới
            </span>
            {% endif %}
            
            <!-- Quick Add Overlay (Đã fix đủ Data attributes) -->
            <div class="absolute inset-x-4 bottom-4 translate-y-8 opacity-0 group-hover:translate-y-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-500 z-20 hidden md:block">
              <button onclick="triggerQuickView(this);" 
                      data-id="{{ product.id }}" 
                      data-slug="{{ product.slug }}"
                      data-name="{{ product.name }}"
                      data-price="{{ product.price }}"
                      data-image="{{ product.thumbnail_url }}"
                      data-category="{{ product.categories.name if product.categories else 'Collection' }}"
                      data-stock="{{ product.stock_quantity | default(10) }}"
                      data-variants='{{ product.product_variants | tojson | safe if product.product_variants else "[]" }}'
                      class="w-full bg-black text-white text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest py-4 hover:bg-neutral-800 shadow-2xl transition-colors">
                Quick View +
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Product Info -->
          <div class="mt-5">
            <p class="text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-neutral-400 mb-1.5">{{ product.categories.name if product.categories else 'Core' }}</p>
            <div class="flex justify-between items-start gap-4">
              <h3 class="text-[13px] font-bold uppercase tracking-tight text-black line-clamp-2 leading-snug hover:text-neutral-500 transition-colors">
                <a href="/product/{{ product.slug or product.id }}">{{ product.name }}</a>
              </h3>
              <p class="text-[13px] font-medium whitespace-nowrap">₫{{ "{:,.0f}".format(product.price) }}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          
        </div>
        {% endfor %}

      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Scroll Progress Indicator -->
    <div class="mt-8 mx-6 md:mx-12 h-[2px] bg-neutral-100 relative overflow-hidden">
      <div id="progressBar" class="absolute top-0 left-0 h-full bg-black w-0 transition-all duration-200"></div>
    </div>
  </section>
  {% endif %}

  {# ══ 3. CATEGORY BENTO GRID (Bảo vệ code bằng If-Check) ══ #}
  {% if categories and categories|length >= 2 %}
  <section class="px-4 md:px-8 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-4 md:gap-6 mb-32">
    {% set cat1 = categories[0] %}
    {% set cat2 = categories[1] %}
    
    <!-- Lớn -->
    <a href="/shop?category={{ cat1.slug }}" class="md:col-span-8 relative group overflow-hidden aspect-[4/5] md:aspect-auto md:h-[80vh] bg-neutral-100">
      <img src="{{ cat1.image_url }}" class="w-full h-full object-cover transition-transform duration-[2000ms] group-hover:scale-105">
      <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-black/10 group-hover:bg-black/30 transition-colors duration-700"></div>
      <div class="absolute bottom-10 left-10 md:bottom-16 md:left-16 text-white transform group-hover:-translate-y-4 transition-transform duration-700">
        <h2 class="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter mb-4">{{ cat1.name }}</h2>
        <span class="text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] border-b-2 border-white pb-1">Explore Edition</span>
      </div>
    </a>
    
    <!-- Nhỏ -->
    <a href="/shop?category={{ cat2.slug }}" class="md:col-span-4 relative group overflow-hidden aspect-[4/5] md:h-[80vh] bg-neutral-100">
      <img src="{{ cat2.image_url }}" class="w-full h-full object-cover transition-transform duration-[2000ms] group-hover:scale-105">
      <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-black/10 group-hover:bg-black/30 transition-colors duration-700"></div>
      <div class="absolute bottom-10 left-10 text-white transform group-hover:-translate-y-4 transition-transform duration-700">
        <h2 class="text-3xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter mb-4">{{ cat2.name }}</h2>
        <span class="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] border-b-2 border-white pb-1">Shop Now</span>
      </div>
    </a>
  </section>
  {% endif %}

</div>

<style>
  .no-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
  .no-scrollbar { -ms-overflow-style: none; scrollbar-width: none; }
  
  /* Tối ưu biến slider cho di động nhìn thấy 1 phần ảnh kế tiếp */
  .slider-item { --item-w: 82vw; }
  @media(min-width:640px) { .slider-item { --item-w: 45vw; } }
  @media(min-width:1024px){ .slider-item { --item-w: 28vw; } }
  @media(min-width:1280px){ .slider-item { --item-w: 22vw; } }

  /* Animation Hero */
  .animate-fade-in-up { animation: fadeInUp 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) forwards; }
  @keyframes fadeInUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
</style>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    const container = document.getElementById('slider-container');
    const progress = document.getElementById('progressBar');
    const btnNext = document.getElementById('btnNext');
    const btnPrev = document.getElementById('btnPrev');

    if (!container) return;

    // 1. Cập nhật UI thanh cuộn
    const updateUI = () => {
        const max = container.scrollWidth - container.clientWidth;
        if (max <= 0) return;
        progress.style.width = (container.scrollLeft / max * 100) + '%';
        btnPrev.disabled = container.scrollLeft <= 10;
        btnNext.disabled = container.scrollLeft >= max - 10;
    };
    container.addEventListener('scroll', updateUI, { passive: true });
    setTimeout(updateUI, 100);

    // 2. Nút điều hướng
    const getStep = () => {
        const item = container.querySelector('.slider-item');
        return item ? item.offsetWidth + 24 : container.clientWidth * 0.8;
    };
    btnNext.onclick = () => container.scrollBy({ left: getStep(), behavior: 'smooth' });
    btnPrev.onclick = () => container.scrollBy({ left: -getStep(), behavior: 'smooth' });

    // 3. Xử lý Kéo thả mượt mà (Kèm chống click lầm)
    let isDown = false, startX, scrollLeft, isDragging = false;

    container.onmousedown = (e) => {
        isDown = true; 
        isDragging = false;
        startX = e.pageX - container.offsetLeft; 
        scrollLeft = container.scrollLeft;
        container.style.cursor = 'grabbing';
        container.classList.remove('scroll-smooth'); // Tắt mượt để kéo ko bị trễ
    };

    window.onmouseup = () => { 
        isDown = false; 
        container.style.cursor = 'grab';
        container.classList.add('scroll-smooth');
        setTimeout(() => isDragging = false, 50); // Delay nhẹ để chặn click
    };

    container.onmousemove = (e) => {
        if(!isDown) return;
        e.preventDefault();
        const x = e.pageX - container.offsetLeft;
        const walk = (x - startX) * 1.5;
        if (Math.abs(walk) > 5) isDragging = true; // Nhận diện đang kéo thật sự
        container.scrollLeft = scrollLeft - walk;
    };

    // Chặn click vào nút Quick View / Link nếu người dùng đang thực hiện thao tác kéo cuộn (Drag)
    container.querySelectorAll('a, button').forEach(el => {
        el.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (isDragging) {
                e.preventDefault();
                e.stopPropagation();
            }
        });
    });
});
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

<style>
  #quick-view-modal .qv-slide{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:32px;opacity:0;transition:opacity .55s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1),transform .55s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);transform:translateX(28px)}
  #quick-view-modal .qv-slide.qv-active{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0);z-index:2}
  #quick-view-modal .qv-slide.qv-prev{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-28px);z-index:1}
  #quick-view-modal .qv-dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:#ccc;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s,transform .2s;border:none;padding:0}
  #quick-view-modal .qv-dot.qv-dot-active{background:#000;transform:scale(1.35)}
  #quick-view-modal .qv-color-swatch{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid transparent;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .2s;position:relative;background:none;padding:0}
  #quick-view-modal .qv-color-swatch::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:-4px;border-radius:50%;border:1.5px solid transparent;transition:border-color .2s}
  #quick-view-modal .qv-color-swatch.qv-sel{border-color:#111;transform:scale(1.12)}
  #quick-view-modal .qv-color-swatch.qv-sel::after{border-color:#111}
  #quick-view-modal .qv-size-btn{height:36px;min-width:44px;padding:0 14px;border:1px solid #e0e0e0;background:#fff;font-size:10px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;transition:all .18s;font-family:inherit}
  #quick-view-modal .qv-size-btn:hover:not(:disabled){border-color:#111}
  #quick-view-modal .qv-size-btn.qv-sel{background:#111;color:#fff;border-color:#111}
  #quick-view-modal .qv-size-btn:disabled{opacity:.28;cursor:not-allowed;text-decoration:line-through}
</style>

<div id="quick-view-modal" class="fixed inset-0 z-[200] hidden items-center justify-center px-4 sm:px-6 opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-300" style="font-family:'DM Sans','Inter',sans-serif">

  {# Backdrop #}

  {# Modal #}

    {# Close #}
    <button onclick="closeQuickView()" class="absolute top-4 right-4 w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center text-stone-300 hover:text-black transition-colors z-50">
      <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"/></svg>
    </button>

    {# ── LEFT: Image Slideshow ── #}
    <div class="w-full md:w-[48%] bg-[#f7f5f2] relative flex-shrink-0 overflow-hidden" style="min-height:320px">
      
      {# Slides container #}
      <div id="qv-slides" class="absolute inset-0"></div>

      {# Arrows #}
      <button onclick="qvSlide(-1)" class="absolute left-2.5 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 z-10 w-8 h-8 bg-white/80 hover:bg-white flex items-center justify-center transition-colors">
        <svg width="13" height="13" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M15 18l-6-6 6-6"/></svg>
      </button>
      <button onclick="qvSlide(1)" class="absolute right-2.5 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 z-10 w-8 h-8 bg-white/80 hover:bg-white flex items-center justify-center transition-colors">
        <svg width="13" height="13" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M9 18l6-6-6-6"/></svg>
      </button>

      {# Dots #}
      <div id="qv-dots" class="absolute bottom-3 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 flex gap-1.5 z-10"></div>
    </div>

    {# ── RIGHT: Product Info ── #}
    <div class="w-full md:w-[52%] flex flex-col overflow-y-auto no-scrollbar bg-white p-8 md:p-10">

      {# Header #}
      <div class="mb-6">
        <p id="qv-category" class="text-[9px] font-medium tracking-[.22em] uppercase text-stone-400 mb-2.5">Collection</p>
        <h2 id="qv-name" class="text-[1.45rem] font-light tracking-tight text-black leading-snug mb-4" style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif">Product Name</h2>
        <div class="flex items-baseline gap-3">
          <span id="qv-price" class="text-base font-medium text-black">0₫</span>
          <span id="qv-price-original" class="text-xs text-stone-300 line-through hidden"></span>
        </div>
        <div id="qv-stock-status" class="mt-3 h-5 text-[9px] font-medium tracking-[.15em] uppercase"></div>
      </div>

      {# Divider #}
      <div class="h-px bg-stone-100 mb-6"></div>

      {# Form #}
      <form action="/cart/add" method="POST" class="flex-1 flex flex-col">
        <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
        <input type="hidden" name="product_id" id="qv-input-id">
        <input type="hidden" name="variant_id" id="qv-variant-id">

        <div class="space-y-7 flex-1">

          {# Color #}
          <div id="qv-color-section" class="hidden">
            <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-3.5">
              <span class="text-[9px] font-medium tracking-[.2em] uppercase text-black">Màu sắc</span>
              <span id="qv-color-label" class="text-[9px] tracking-[.15em] uppercase text-stone-500"></span>
            </div>
            <div id="qv-colors" class="flex flex-wrap gap-2.5"></div>
          </div>

          {# Size #}
          <div id="qv-size-section" class="hidden">
            <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-3.5">
              <span class="text-[9px] font-medium tracking-[.2em] uppercase text-black">Kích thước</span>
              <button type="button" class="text-[9px] font-medium tracking-widest uppercase text-stone-400 hover:text-black border-b border-stone-200 pb-px transition-colors">Bảng size</button>
            </div>
            <div id="qv-sizes" class="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5"></div>
          </div>

        </div>

        {# Actions #}
        <div class="mt-8 space-y-3">
          <div class="h-px bg-stone-100 mb-5"></div>

          {# Qty + Add #}
          <div class="flex gap-2.5">
            <div class="flex items-center border border-stone-200 h-12 px-4 gap-1">
              <button type="button" onclick="qvChangeQty(-1)" class="w-6 text-base text-stone-400 hover:text-black transition-colors font-light">−</button>
              <input type="number" id="qv-qty" name="quantity" value="1" readonly class="w-8 text-center text-[11px] font-medium bg-transparent outline-none pointer-events-none">
              <button type="button" onclick="qvChangeQty(1)" class="w-6 text-base text-stone-400 hover:text-black transition-colors font-light">+</button>
            </div>
            <button type="submit" id="qv-submit-btn"
              class="flex-1 bg-black text-white h-12 text-[10px] font-medium tracking-[.2em] uppercase transition-all hover:bg-stone-800 disabled:bg-stone-100 disabled:text-stone-300 disabled:cursor-not-allowed">
              Thêm vào giỏ hàng
            </button>
          </div>

          {# Detail link #}
          <a href="#" id="qv-detail-link" class="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 h-10 border border-stone-200 hover:border-black transition-colors text-[10px] font-medium tracking-[.18em] uppercase text-stone-500 hover:text-black">
            Xem chi tiết sản phẩm
            <svg width="12" height="12" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg>
          </a>
        </div>
      </form>
    </div>
  </div>

<script>
(function(){
  window.qvMaxStock = 1;
  window.currentProductVariants = [];
  window.currentBasePrice = 0;
  window._qvCur = 0;
  window._qvImages = [];

  const COLOR_MAP = {
    'đen':'#111','black':'#111','trắng':'#fff','white':'#fff','đỏ':'#dc2626','red':'#dc2626',
    'xanh dương':'#2563eb','blue':'#2563eb','xanh navy':'#1e3a8a','navy':'#1e3a8a',
    'xanh lá':'#16a34a','green':'#16a34a','vàng':'#eab308','yellow':'#eab308',
    'cam':'#ea580c','orange':'#ea580c','hồng':'#ec4899','pink':'#ec4899',
    'tím':'#9333ea','purple':'#9333ea','xám':'#6b7280','gray':'#6b7280','grey':'#6b7280',
    'nâu':'#78350f','brown':'#78350f','be':'#d4c5b0','beige':'#d4c5b0','kem':'#fef3c7','cream':'#fef3c7'
  };

  function hexFromName(n){ return n ? (COLOR_MAP[n.toLowerCase().trim()]||'#ccc') : '#ccc'; }

  function qvBuildSlides(images){
    window._qvImages = images.length ? images : [''];
    window._qvCur = 0;
    const sc = document.getElementById('qv-slides');
    const dc = document.getElementById('qv-dots');
    if(!sc||!dc) return;
    sc.innerHTML = '';
    dc.innerHTML = '';
    window._qvImages.forEach((src,i)=>{
      const slide = document.createElement('div');
      slide.className = 'qv-slide' + (i===0?' qv-active':'');
      slide.innerHTML = `<img src="${src}" alt="Look ${i+1}" style="max-height:380px;max-width:100%;object-fit:contain;mix-blend-multiply;transition:opacity .4s" onerror="this.style.opacity='.3'">`;
      sc.appendChild(slide);
      const dot = document.createElement('button');
      dot.className = 'qv-dot' + (i===0?' qv-dot-active':'');
      dot.type = 'button';
      dot.onclick = ()=>qvGoTo(i);
      dc.appendChild(dot);
    });
  }

  window.qvGoTo = function(n){
    const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.qv-slide');
    if(!slides.length) return;
    slides[window._qvCur].classList.remove('qv-active');
    slides[window._qvCur].classList.add('qv-prev');
    const prev = window._qvCur;
    window._qvCur = (n+slides.length)%slides.length;
    slides[window._qvCur].classList.add('qv-active');
    setTimeout(()=>slides[prev].classList.remove('qv-prev'),600);
    document.querySelectorAll('.qv-dot').forEach((d,i)=>d.classList.toggle('qv-dot-active',i===window._qvCur));
  };

  window.qvSlide = function(d){ qvGoTo(window._qvCur+d); };

  window.triggerQuickView = function(btn){
    const id=btn.getAttribute('data-id'), slug=btn.getAttribute('data-slug'),
      name=btn.getAttribute('data-name'), price=btn.getAttribute('data-price'),
      image=btn.getAttribute('data-image'), category=btn.getAttribute('data-category'),
      stock=parseInt(btn.getAttribute('data-stock'))||0;
    let variants=[], images=[];
    try{
      const rv=btn.getAttribute('data-variants');
      if(rv&&rv!=='None'&&rv!=='[]') variants=JSON.parse(rv);
    }catch(e){}
    try{
      const ri=btn.getAttribute('data-images');
      if(ri&&ri!=='None'&&ri!=='[]') images=JSON.parse(ri);
    }catch(e){}
    if(!images.length&&image) images=[image];
    openQuickView(id,slug,name,price,images,category,stock,variants);
  };

  window.openQuickView = function(id,slug,name,price,images,category,stock,variants){
    const modal=document.getElementById('quick-view-modal');
    if(!modal) return;
    window.currentProductVariants=variants||[];
    window.currentBasePrice=parseFloat(price)||0;
    document.getElementById('qv-input-id').value=id;
    document.getElementById('qv-name').textContent=name;
    document.getElementById('qv-category').textContent=category;
    document.getElementById('qv-detail-link').href=`/product/${slug||id}`;
    document.getElementById('qv-qty').value=1;
    qvBuildSlides(Array.isArray(images)?images:[images]);
    const cs=document.getElementById('qv-color-section'), ss=document.getElementById('qv-size-section');
    if(window.currentProductVariants.length>0){
      cs.classList.remove('hidden'); ss.classList.remove('hidden');
      const uniqColors=[];
      window.currentProductVariants.forEach(v=>{
        if(v.color_name&&!uniqColors.find(c=>c.name===v.color_name))
          uniqColors.push({name:v.color_name,hex:v.color_hex||v.hex_code||hexFromName(v.color_name)});
      });
      document.getElementById('qv-colors').innerHTML=uniqColors.map((c,i)=>`
        <button type="button" class="qv-color-swatch${i===0?' qv-sel':''}" data-color="${c.name}" style="background:${c.hex}" onclick="qvPickColor(this)"></button>
      `).join('');
      if(uniqColors.length) qvRenderSizes(uniqColors[0].name);
    } else {
      cs.classList.add('hidden'); ss.classList.add('hidden');
      document.getElementById('qv-variant-id').value='';
      qvUpdateUI(stock,window.currentBasePrice,null);
    }
    modal.classList.remove('hidden'); modal.classList.add('flex');
    requestAnimationFrame(()=>{
      modal.classList.add('opacity-100');
      document.getElementById('qv-inner').classList.add('scale-100');
    });
    document.body.style.overflow='hidden';
  };

  window.qvPickColor = function(btn){
    document.querySelectorAll('#qv-colors .qv-color-swatch').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('qv-sel'));
    btn.classList.add('qv-sel');
    qvRenderSizes(btn.dataset.color);
  };

  window.qvRenderSizes = function(colorName){
    document.getElementById('qv-color-label').textContent=colorName;
    const variants=window.currentProductVariants.filter(v=>v.color_name===colorName);
    const first=variants.find(v=>v.stock>0)||null;
    document.getElementById('qv-sizes').innerHTML=variants.map(v=>{
      const ok=v.stock>0;
      const sel=(first&&v.id===first.id)?' qv-sel':'';
      return '<button type="button" class="qv-size-btn'+sel+'"'
        +' data-vid="'+v.id+'" data-stock="'+v.stock+'" data-price="'+(v.price_override||window.currentBasePrice)+'"'
        +(ok?'':' disabled')+' onclick="qvPickSize(this)">'+v.size+'</button>';
    }).join('');
    if(first) qvUpdateUI(first.stock,first.price_override||window.currentBasePrice,first.id);
    else qvUpdateUI(0,window.currentBasePrice,null);
  };

  window.qvPickSize = function(btn){
    document.querySelectorAll('#qv-sizes .qv-size-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('qv-sel'));
    btn.classList.add('qv-sel');
    qvUpdateUI(parseInt(btn.dataset.stock),parseFloat(btn.dataset.price),btn.dataset.vid);
  };

  window.qvUpdateUI = function(stock,price,vid){
    const sub=document.getElementById('qv-submit-btn'), st=document.getElementById('qv-stock-status'), po=document.getElementById('qv-price-original');
    document.getElementById('qv-variant-id').value=vid||'';
    document.getElementById('qv-price').textContent=Number(price).toLocaleString('vi-VN')+'₫';
    if(price<window.currentBasePrice){ po.textContent=Number(window.currentBasePrice).toLocaleString('vi-VN')+'₫'; po.classList.remove('hidden'); }
    else po.classList.add('hidden');
    if(stock>0){
      window.qvMaxStock=stock; sub.disabled=false; sub.textContent='Thêm vào giỏ hàng';
      st.innerHTML='<span style="color:#2a9d5c">● Còn hàng</span>';
    } else {
      window.qvMaxStock=1; sub.disabled=true; sub.textContent='Tạm hết hàng';
      st.innerHTML='<span style="color:#e05050">● Hết hàng</span>';
    }
  };

  window.closeQuickView = function(){
    const modal=document.getElementById('quick-view-modal');
    if(!modal) return;
    modal.classList.remove('opacity-100');
    document.getElementById('qv-inner').classList.remove('scale-100');
    setTimeout(()=>{ modal.classList.remove('flex'); modal.classList.add('hidden'); document.body.style.overflow=''; },300);
  };

  window.qvChangeQty = function(d){
    const el=document.getElementById('qv-qty');
    if(!el) return;
    const v=parseInt(el.value)+d;
    if(v>=1&&v<=window.qvMaxStock) el.value=v;
  };

  document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{ if(e.key==='Escape') closeQuickView(); });
})();
</script>
</file>

  .grid > div:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 400ms; }

<script>
  function copyPromoCode(code, btnElement) {
    const textSpan = btnElement.querySelector('.btn-text');
    const originalText = textSpan.innerText;

    navigator.clipboard.writeText(code).then(() => {
      // Đổi UI của nút khi copy thành công
      textSpan.innerText = "Đã chép";
      btnElement.classList.remove('bg-white', 'text-black');
      btnElement.classList.add('bg-emerald-500', 'text-white');
      
      if(typeof showToast === 'function') {
        showToast(`ĐÃ SAO CHÉP MÃ: ${code}`);
      }

      // Phục hồi lại nút sau 2 giây
      setTimeout(() => {
        textSpan.innerText = "Sao chép";
        btnElement.classList.remove('bg-emerald-500', 'text-white');
        btnElement.classList.add('bg-white', 'text-black');
      }, 2000);
      
    }).catch(err => {
      console.error('Lỗi khi sao chép: ', err);
      if(typeof showToast === 'function') {
        showToast("LỖI SAO CHÉP MÃ", true);
      } else {
        alert('Trình duyệt không hỗ trợ. Vui lòng tự bôi đen mã.');
      }
    });
  }
</script>
{% endblock %}
