<script id="pdata" type="application/json">
  {{ product.product_variants|tojson|safe if product and product.product_variants else '[]' }}
</script>

<script>
(function(){
  /* ══ Barcode Logic ══════════════════════════════════════════ */
  const BARCODE_VALUE = "{{ product.barcode if product and product.barcode else '' }}";

  function renderBarcode(code) {
    try {
      JsBarcode("#barcodePreview", code, {
        format:      "CODE128",
        width:       1.8,
        height:      56,
        displayValue: false,   // Hiển thị text riêng bên dưới
        background:  "transparent",
        lineColor:   "#181614",
        margin:      4,
      });
      document.getElementById('barcodeText').textContent = code;
    } catch(e) {
      console.warn('JsBarcode error:', e);
    }
  }

  // Sản phẩm đã có barcode → render ngay
  if (BARCODE_VALUE) {
    renderBarcode(BARCODE_VALUE);
  } else {
    // Sản phẩm mới: render preview động theo tên
    const nameInput = document.getElementById('prod_name');
    function renderPreview() {
      const name = nameInput.value.trim();
      const preview = name
        ? 'GUA-PREVIEW-' + name.replace(/\s+/g, '').slice(0,4).toUpperCase()
        : 'GUA-PREVIEW';
      renderBarcode(preview);
    }
    nameInput.addEventListener('input', renderPreview);
    renderPreview();
  }

  window.printBarcode = function() {
    const svg   = document.getElementById('barcodePreview');
    const label = document.getElementById('barcodeText').textContent;
    const svgData = new XMLSerializer().serializeToString(svg);
    const html = `<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta charset="UTF-8">
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@400;700&display=swap');
  @page{margin:0}
  body{margin:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:100vh;background:#fff;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif}
  .wrap{text-align:center;padding:20mm 14mm;border:1px dashed #ccc;display:inline-block}
  .brand{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;color:#181614}
  svg{display:block;margin:0 auto}
  .code{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:8px;color:#181614}
</style></head><body>
<div class="wrap">
  <div class="brand">GUA MAISON</div>
  ${svgData}
  <div class="code">${label}</div>
</div>
<script>window.onload=()=>{window.print();setTimeout(()=>window.close(),500)}<\/script>
</body></html>`;
    const w = window.open('','_blank','width=420,height=320');
    w.document.open(); w.document.write(html); w.document.close();
  };

  window.downloadBarcode = function() {
    const svg    = document.getElementById('barcodePreview');
    const label  = document.getElementById('barcodeText').textContent;
    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
    const padding = 24;
    const svgW = svg.width?.baseVal?.value || 200;
    const svgH = svg.height?.baseVal?.value || 80;
    canvas.width  = svgW + padding * 2;
    canvas.height = svgH + padding * 2 + 24;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

    const img = new Image();
    const svgBlob = new Blob([new XMLSerializer().serializeToString(svg)], {type:'image/svg+xml'});
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(svgBlob);
    img.onload = function() {
      ctx.drawImage(img, padding, padding);
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace';
      ctx.fillStyle = '#181614';
      ctx.textAlign = 'center';
      ctx.letterSpacing = '0.1em';
      ctx.fillText(label, canvas.width / 2, svgH + padding + 18);
      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
      const a = document.createElement('a');
      a.download = `barcode-${label}.png`;
      a.href = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
      a.click();
    };
    img.src = url;
  };

  /* ══ Variant Logic (giữ nguyên từ bản gốc) ══════════════════ */
  const SIZES=['XS','S','M','L','XL','XXL','38','39','40','41','42','43'];
  const COLORS=[
    {n:'Đen',h:'#1c1917'},{n:'Trắng',h:'#fafaf9'},{n:'Xám',h:'#78716c'},{n:'Đỏ',h:'#ef4444'},
    {n:'Xanh dương',h:'#3b82f6'},{n:'Xanh navy',h:'#1e3a8a'},{n:'Xanh lá',h:'#22c55e'},
    {n:'Vàng',h:'#eab308'},{n:'Nâu',h:'#78350f'},{n:'Hồng',h:'#ec4899'},{n:'Tím',h:'#d946ef'},
    {n:'Cam',h:'#f97316'},{n:'Be',h:'#f5f5dc'},{n:'Kem',h:'#fef3c7'}
  ];

  let groups = [];
  const raw  = JSON.parse(document.getElementById('pdata').textContent);

  if (raw.length) {
    raw.forEach(v => {
      let g = groups.find(g => g.cn === v.color_name && g.ch === v.color_hex);
      if (!g) { g = {cn: v.color_name, ch: v.color_hex, sz: []}; groups.push(g); }
      g.sz.push({s: v.size, k: v.stock, p: v.price_override || ''});
    });
  } else {
    groups.push({cn: '', ch: '#1c1917', sz: []});
  }

  function render() {
    const bp = document.getElementById('base_price').value;
    const ph = bp ? `Giá gốc: ${(+bp).toLocaleString('vi-VN')}đ` : 'Bằng giá niêm yết';
    const c = document.getElementById('vgc');
    c.innerHTML = groups.map((g, gi) => {
      const chips = SIZES.map(s => {
        const on = g.sz.some(z => z.s === s);
        return `<button type="button" class="chip${on?' on':''}" onclick="tSz(${gi},'${s}')">${s}</button>`;
      }).join('');
      const rows = g.sz.length ? `
        <div class="vr-table">${g.sz.map((z, zi) => `
          <div class="vr-row">
            <input type="hidden" name="v_color[]"     value="${g.cn}">
            <input type="hidden" name="v_color_hex[]" value="${g.ch}">
            <input type="hidden" name="v_size[]"      value="${z.s}">
            <span class="vr-size">${z.s}</span>
            <div class="vr-inp"><label>Kho *</label><input type="number" name="v_stock[]" value="${z.k}" min="0" required onchange="upSz(${gi},${zi},'k',this.value)"></div>
            <div class="vr-inp"><label>Giá</label><input type="number" name="v_price_override[]" value="${z.p}" placeholder="${ph}" onchange="upSz(${gi},${zi},'p',this.value)"></div>
            <button type="button" class="vr-del" onclick="tSz(${gi},'${z.s}')"><svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></button>
          </div>`).join('')}
        </div>` : '';

      return `
        <div class="vg">
          ${groups.length > 1 ? `<button type="button" class="btn btn-r btn-sm" style="position:absolute;top:16px;right:16px" onclick="rmGrp(${gi})">Xóa nhóm</button>` : ''}
          <div class="vg-header">
            <div>
              <p class="vg-title">1. Định danh màu <span style="color:#c0392b">*</span></p>
              <div class="color-pick">
                <label class="color-swatch" style="background:${g.ch}"><input type="color" value="${g.ch}" onchange="upGrp(${gi},'ch',this.value)"></label>
                <div style="flex:1;position:relative">
                  <input class="inp" style="padding:10px 14px" value="${g.cn}" required placeholder="Tên màu (VD: Đen)" oninput="suggest(this,${gi})" onchange="upGrp(${gi},'cn',this.value)">
                  <div id="sg${gi}" class="suggest"></div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div>
              <p class="vg-title">2. Kích thước <span style="color:var(--muted);font-weight:400;text-transform:none;letter-spacing:0"> — click để bật/tắt</span></p>
              <div class="size-chips">
                ${chips}
                <div class="chip-add">
                  <input id="cs${gi}" placeholder="Khác..." onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'){event.preventDefault();cSz(${gi})}">
                  <button onclick="cSz(${gi})">+</button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          ${rows}
        </div>`;
    }).join('');
  }

  window.addGroup = () => { groups.push({cn:'',ch:'#1c1917',sz:[]}); render(); };
  window.rmGrp   = i  => { groups.splice(i,1); if(!groups.length) addGroup(); else render(); };
  window.tSz     = (gi,s) => { const g=groups[gi],i=g.sz.findIndex(z=>z.s===s); i>=0?g.sz.splice(i,1):g.sz.push({s,k:0,p:''}); render(); };
  window.cSz     = gi => { const el=document.getElementById(`cs${gi}`),v=el.value.trim().toUpperCase(); if(v&&v.length<=6){tSz(gi,v)}; };
  window.upGrp   = (gi,k,v) => { groups[gi][k]=v; render(); };
  window.upSz    = (gi,si,k,v) => { groups[gi].sz[si][k]=v; };
  window.syncPricePlaceholder = () => render();

  window.suggest = (el, gi) => {
    const q=el.value.toLowerCase().trim(), box=document.getElementById(`sg${gi}`);
    if(!q){box.style.display='none';return}
    const m=COLORS.filter(c=>c.n.toLowerCase().includes(q)).slice(0,5);
    if(!m.length){box.style.display='none';return}
    box.innerHTML=m.map(c=>`<div class="suggest-item" onclick="pick(${gi},'${c.h}','${c.n}')"><div class="suggest-dot" style="background:${c.h}"></div><span>${c.n}</span></div>`).join('');
    box.style.display='block';
  };
  window.pick = (gi,h,n) => { groups[gi].ch=h; groups[gi].cn=n; render(); };
  document.addEventListener('click', e => {
    if(!e.target.closest('.suggest')&&!e.target.closest('input'))
      document.querySelectorAll('.suggest').forEach(b=>b.style.display='none');
  });

  window.handleFiles = inp => Array.from(inp.files).forEach(f => {
    const r=new FileReader(); r.onload=e=>addImgCard(e.target.result,true); r.readAsDataURL(f); setSync();
  });
  window.addUrl = () => {
    const i=document.getElementById('urlInput'), u=i.value.trim();
    if(!u||!u.startsWith('http')) return;
    addImgCard(u,false); i.value=''; setSync();
  };
  function addImgCard(url,isFile){
    const g=document.getElementById('imgGrid'), first=!g.children.length;
    const d=document.createElement('div'); d.className='img-card';
    d.innerHTML=`<img src="${url}"><input type="hidden" name="image_urls" value="${isFile?'':url}"><button type="button" onclick="removeImg(this)" class="img-del"><svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></button>${first?'<div class="img-cover">Ảnh bìa</div>':''}`;
    g.appendChild(d);
  }
  window.removeImg = btn => {
    const g=document.getElementById('imgGrid');
    btn.closest('.img-card').remove();
    const f=g.querySelector('.img-card');
    if(f&&!f.querySelector('.img-cover')){const b=document.createElement('div');b.className='img-cover';b.textContent='Ảnh bìa';f.appendChild(b)}
    setSync();
  };
  function setSync(){document.getElementById('imgSync').value='1'}

  document.getElementById('productForm').onsubmit = function(e) {
    const bp=document.getElementById('base_price'), err=document.getElementById('price-error');
    if(!bp.value||+bp.value<=0){e.preventDefault();err.style.display='block';bp.style.borderColor='#c0392b';bp.focus();return false}
    if(!groups.some(g=>g.sz.length)){e.preventDefault();alert('⚠ Vui lòng chọn ít nhất 1 kích thước!');return false}
    return true;
  };

  render();
})();
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

                       oninput="this.value = this.value.toUpperCase()">
                <button type="button" id="btn-coupon" onclick="Coupon.apply()" 
                        class="bg-white text-stone-900 px-5 py-3 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-stone-200 transition-colors">

              </div>
            </div>

            <button type="submit" id="btn-submit" class="w-full mt-8 bg-white text-stone-900 py-4 rounded-2xl text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center gap-3 hover:bg-stone-200 active:scale-[0.98] transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)]">
              <span id="btn-text">Hoàn tất đặt hàng (COD)</span>
              <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-right-long" id="btn-icon"></i>
            </button>
          </div>

          {# Trust badge #}
          <div class="flex items-center gap-4 bg-emerald-50 border border-emerald-100 p-5 rounded-3xl">
            <div class="w-10 h-10 bg-emerald-500 text-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shrink-0">
              <i class="fa-solid fa-shield-halved"></i>
            </div>
            <div>
              <p class="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-emerald-900 mb-0.5">Thanh toán bảo mật</p>
              <p class="text-xs font-medium text-emerald-700/80">Dữ liệu được mã hóa an toàn 256-bit.</p>
            </div>
          </div>

        </div>
      </div>

    </form>
  </div>
</div>

{# ── STYLE BỔ TRỢ (Chỉ giữ lại các class toggle logic) ── #}
<style>
  /* Ẩn thanh cuộn của danh sách sản phẩm */
  .no-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
  .no-scrollbar { -ms-overflow-style: none; scrollbar-width: none; }

  /* Style cho thẻ được chọn (Active) */
  .address-item.is-active { border-color: #1c1917 !important; background-color: #f5f5f4 !important; }
  .address-item.is-active .radio-ring { border-color: #1c1917 !important; }
  .address-item.is-active .radio-dot { transform: scale(1) !important; }

  .payment-item.is-active { border-color: #1c1917 !important; background-color: #f5f5f4 !important; }
  .payment-item.is-active .icon-pay { color: #1c1917 !important; }
  .payment-item.is-active .img-pay { filter: grayscale(0) !important; }
</style>

{# ── SCRIPTS ── #}
<script>
const Checkout = (() => {
  let currentShippingFee = 0;
  const subtotalAmount = parseInt("{{ total }}") || 0;

  async function calculateShipping(addressId, provinceName) {
    const shipSpan = document.getElementById('shipping-fee');
    shipSpan.innerText = 'Đang tính...';
    shipSpan.className = 'text-white/60';

    try {
      const res = await fetch('/cart/calculate-shipping', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-CSRFToken': '{{ csrf_token() }}' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ province: provinceName, subtotal: subtotalAmount })
      });
      const data = await res.json();

      if(data.success) {
        currentShippingFee = data.shipping_fee;
        updateTotalUI();

        const warningBox = document.getElementById('shipping-warning');
        if (data.warning && data.warning.trim() !== '') {
          warningBox.innerHTML = `
            <i class="fa-solid fa-cloud-bolt text-lg mt-0.5 shrink-0"></i>
            <div>
              <p class="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest mb-1 text-amber-300">Cảnh báo vận chuyển</p>
              <p class="text-xs font-medium leading-relaxed">${data.warning}</p>
            </div>
          `;
          warningBox.classList.remove('hidden');
        } else {
          warningBox.classList.add('hidden');
        }
      }
    } catch(e) { console.error("Lỗi lấy phí ship", e); }
  }

  function selectAddress(id, provinceName) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.address-item').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('is-active', 'border-stone-900', 'bg-stone-50'));
    document.querySelectorAll('.address-item').forEach(el => el.classList.add('border-stone-100'));
    
    const activeEl = document.getElementById('label-' + id);
    if(activeEl) {
      activeEl.classList.remove('border-stone-100');
      activeEl.classList.add('is-active');
    }
    document.querySelector(`input[value="${id}"]`).checked = true;
    calculateShipping(id, provinceName);
  }

  function selectPayment(method) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.payment-item').forEach(el => {
      el.classList.remove('is-active');
      el.classList.add('border-stone-100');
    });
    
    const activeEl = document.getElementById('pay-' + method.toLowerCase());
    if(activeEl) {
      activeEl.classList.remove('border-stone-100');
      activeEl.classList.add('is-active');
    }
    
    document.querySelector(`input[value="${method}"]`).checked = true;
    document.getElementById('btn-text').innerText = method === 'VNPAY' ? 'Thanh toán qua VNPay' : 'Hoàn tất đặt hàng (COD)';
  }

  function updateTotalUI() {
    const discountText = document.getElementById('discount-amount')?.innerText.replace(/,/g, '') || "0";
    const discount = parseInt(discountText) || 0;

    const shipSpan = document.getElementById('shipping-fee');
    if(currentShippingFee === 0) {
      shipSpan.innerHTML = 'Miễn phí';
      shipSpan.className = 'text-emerald-400 font-bold';
    } else {
      shipSpan.innerHTML = currentShippingFee.toLocaleString('en-US') + ' đ';
      shipSpan.className = 'text-white font-bold'; 
    }

    const final = subtotalAmount - discount + currentShippingFee;
    document.getElementById('final-total').innerText = final.toLocaleString('en-US') + " ₫";
  }

  function handleSubmit(e) {
    const btn  = document.getElementById('btn-submit');
    const text = document.getElementById('btn-text');
    const icon = document.getElementById('btn-icon');
    if (btn.disabled) { e.preventDefault(); return; }
    
    btn.disabled = true;
    btn.classList.add('opacity-70', 'cursor-not-allowed');
    text.innerText = 'Đang xử lý...';
    icon.className = 'fa-solid fa-circle-notch fa-spin';
  }

  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
    const defaultAddressInput = document.querySelector('input[name="address_id"]:checked');
    if (defaultAddressInput) {
      const province = defaultAddressInput.getAttribute('data-province') || "";
      calculateShipping(defaultAddressInput.value, province);
    }
  });

  return { selectAddress, selectPayment, handleSubmit, updateTotalUI };
})();

const Coupon = (() => {
  const $ = id => document.getElementById(id);

  function setMsg(text, isOk) {
    const el = $('coupon-msg');
    el.innerText = text;
    el.className = `text-[10px] font-bold mt-2 ${isOk ? 'text-emerald-400' : 'text-red-400'}`;
    el.classList.remove('hidden');
  }

  async function apply() {
    const code = $('coupon-input').value.trim().toUpperCase();
    if (!code) { setMsg('⚠ Vui lòng nhập mã để áp dụng.', false); return; }

    const btn = $('btn-coupon');
    btn.disabled = true; btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-circle-notch fa-spin"></i>';

    try {
      const res  = await fetch('/cart/apply-coupon', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-CSRFToken': '{{ csrf_token() }}' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ code }),
      });
      const data = await res.json();

      if (data.valid) {
        setMsg(`✓ Áp dụng thành công! Giảm ${data.discount.toLocaleString('en-US')}₫`, true);
        $('discount-row').classList.remove('hidden');
        $('coupon-label').innerText = data.code;
        $('discount-amount').innerText = data.discount.toLocaleString('en-US');
        
        Checkout.updateTotalUI();
        
        $('hidden-coupon-code').value = data.code;
        $('coupon-input').disabled = true;
        btn.style.display = 'none';
      } else {
        setMsg(`✕ ${data.error}`, false);
        $('discount-row').classList.add('hidden');
        $('hidden-coupon-code').value = '';
        btn.disabled = false; btn.innerText = 'Áp dụng';
      }
    } catch {
      setMsg('Lỗi kết nối. Vui lòng thử lại.', false);
      btn.disabled = false; btn.innerText = 'Áp dụng';
    }
  }

  return { apply };
})();
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {

  /* ==============================
     🎯 ANALYTICS CORE
  ============================== */
  const PRODUCT_ID = "{{ product.id }}";

  function getTrafficSource() {
    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    return params.get("utm_source") || localStorage.getItem("utm_source") || "organic";
  }

  function trackEvent(eventType, qty = 1) {
    try {
      const payload = JSON.stringify({
        product_id: PRODUCT_ID,
        event_type: eventType,
        channel: "web",
        source: getTrafficSource(),
        qty: qty
      });

      if (navigator.sendBeacon) {
        const blob = new Blob([payload], { type: "application/json" });
        navigator.sendBeacon("/api/analytics/track", blob);
      } else {
        fetch("/api/analytics/track", {
          method: "POST",
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
          body: payload
        }).catch(() => {});
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.warn("Tracking error:", err);
    }
  }

  if (PRODUCT_ID) trackEvent("view");

  const form = document.querySelector('form[action="/cart/add"]');
  if (form) {
    form.addEventListener("submit", () => {
      const qty = parseInt(document.getElementById("qty")?.value || 1);
      trackEvent("cart", qty);
    });
  }

  /* ==============================
     ❤️ YÊU THÍCH
  ============================== */
  const wishlistBtn = document.getElementById("btn-wishlist");
  if (wishlistBtn) {
    wishlistBtn.addEventListener("click", async function() {
      const productId = this.dataset.pid;
      wishlistBtn.disabled = true;
      try {
        const favRes = await fetch('/api/favorites/toggle', {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-CSRFToken': '{{ csrf_token() }}' },
          body: JSON.stringify({ product_id: productId })
        });
        const favData = await favRes.json();
        if (favData.status === 'success') {
          if (favData.action === 'added') {
            wishlistBtn.classList.remove('text-neutral-400', 'border-neutral-200');
            wishlistBtn.classList.add('text-red-500', 'border-red-500');
            trackEvent("wishlist", 1);
          } else {
            wishlistBtn.classList.remove('text-red-500', 'border-red-500');
            wishlistBtn.classList.add('text-neutral-400', 'border-neutral-200');
          }
        } else if (favRes.status === 401) {
          alert("Vui lòng đăng nhập để sử dụng tính năng này!");
          window.location.href = "/auth/login"; // Đã sửa url /login -> /auth/login
        }
      } catch (err) {
        console.error("Lỗi Wishlist:", err);
      } finally {
        wishlistBtn.disabled = false;
      }
    });
  }

  /* ==============================
     🎨 UI LOGIC
  ============================== */
  document.querySelectorAll('.color-swatch').forEach(el => {
    el.style.backgroundColor = el.dataset.bg;
  });

  const firstColor = document.querySelector('.color-radio');
  if (firstColor) { 
    firstColor.checked = true; 
    selectColor(firstColor.value); 
  }

  document.querySelectorAll('.color-radio').forEach(radio => {
    radio.addEventListener('change', function() { selectColor(this.value); });
  });

  document.querySelectorAll('.size-radio').forEach(radio => {
    radio.addEventListener('change', function() {
      const vid = this.dataset.vid;
      const stock = parseInt(this.dataset.stock);
      const price = parseFloat(this.dataset.price);
      selectSize(vid, stock, price);
    });
  });

  document.querySelectorAll('.btn-qty').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', function() { chQty(parseInt(this.dataset.qty)); });
  });

  document.querySelectorAll('.btn-slide').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', function() { slide(parseInt(this.dataset.dir)); });
  });

  document.querySelectorAll('.thumbnail-btn').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', function() { goTo(parseInt(this.dataset.index)); });
  });

});

/* ==============================
   🧠 BUSINESS LOGIC
============================== */
function selectColor(color) {
  document.getElementById('color-label').innerText = color;
  document.querySelectorAll('.size-group').forEach(g => { g.style.display = 'none'; });

  const activeGroup = document.querySelector(`.size-group[data-color="${color}"]`);
  if(activeGroup) {
      activeGroup.style.display = 'flex';
      const firstAvailableSize = activeGroup.querySelector('.size-radio:not([disabled])');

      if (firstAvailableSize) {
          firstAvailableSize.checked = true;
          selectSize(
              firstAvailableSize.dataset.vid, 
              parseInt(firstAvailableSize.dataset.stock), 
              parseFloat(firstAvailableSize.dataset.price)
          );
      } else {
          disableSubmitState("Đã hết hàng cho màu này");
      }
  }
}

function selectSize(vid, stock, price) {
  const btn = document.getElementById('btn-submit');
  const status = document.getElementById('stock-status');
  const priceEl = document.getElementById('price-display');
  const originalPriceEl = document.getElementById('price-original');
  const vidInput = document.getElementById('selected-variant-id');
  const qtyInput = document.getElementById('qty');
  const basePrice = parseFloat(priceEl.dataset.basePrice);

  btn.disabled = false;
  btn.innerText = "Thêm vào giỏ hàng";
  // Sửa giao diện nút khi Active chuẩn K-Fashion
  btn.className = "flex-1 h-14 bg-black text-white text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] rounded-sm hover:bg-neutral-800 transition-all flex items-center justify-center";

  if (stock <= 5) {
      status.innerHTML = `<span class="text-rose-500">Chỉ còn ${stock} sản phẩm</span>`;
  } else {
      status.innerHTML = `<span class="text-emerald-600">Sẵn sàng giao — Còn ${stock} sản phẩm</span>`;
  }

  priceEl.innerText = new Intl.NumberFormat('vi-VN').format(price) + " ₫";

  if (price < basePrice) {
      originalPriceEl.innerText = new Intl.NumberFormat('vi-VN').format(basePrice) + " ₫";
      originalPriceEl.classList.remove('hidden');
      priceEl.classList.add('text-red-500');
  } else {
      originalPriceEl.classList.add('hidden');
      priceEl.classList.remove('text-red-500');
  }

  vidInput.value = vid;
  qtyInput.max = stock;
  if(parseInt(qtyInput.value) > stock) qtyInput.value = stock;
}

function disableSubmitState(message) {
  const btn = document.getElementById('btn-submit');
  btn.disabled = true;
  btn.innerText = "Không khả dụng";
  // Sửa giao diện nút khi Disabled
  btn.className = "flex-1 h-14 bg-neutral-100 text-neutral-400 text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] rounded-sm cursor-not-allowed flex items-center justify-center";

  document.getElementById('selected-variant-id').value = '';
  document.getElementById('stock-status').innerText = message;

  const originalPriceEl = document.getElementById('price-original');
  originalPriceEl.classList.add('hidden');
  document.getElementById('price-display').classList.remove('text-red-500');
}

function chQty(d) {
  const el = document.getElementById('qty');
  const maxStock = parseInt(el.max) || 1;
  let v = parseInt(el.value) + d;
  if (v < 1) v = 1;
  if (v > maxStock) v = maxStock;
  el.value = v;
}

/* ==============================
   🎞 CAROUSEL
============================== */
const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.carousel-slide');
let current = 0;

function goTo(n) {
  if (slides.length <= 1) return;

  slides[current].style.opacity = '0';
  slides[current].style.zIndex = '0';

  current = (n + slides.length) % slides.length;

  slides[current].style.opacity = '1';
  slides[current].style.zIndex = '10';

  // Sửa UI Thumbnail highlight
  document.querySelectorAll('.thumbnail-btn').forEach((b, i) => {
    b.classList.toggle('ring-1', i === current);
    b.classList.toggle('ring-black', i === current);
    b.classList.toggle('ring-offset-2', i === current);
    b.style.opacity = (i === current) ? '1' : '0.4';
  });
}

function slide(d) { goTo(current + d); }
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

<file path="app/__init__.py">
"""
app/__init__.py  –  Application Factory (GUA MAISON 2026 Edition)
"""
import os
import logging
from flask import Flask, session, render_template_string
from flask_wtf.csrf import CSRFProtect, CSRFError

from config.settings import get_config, validate_config

logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO)
logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

csrf = CSRFProtect()

from app.models.cart_model     import CartModel
from app.models.category_model import CategoryModel
from app.models.setting_model  import SettingModel

# ── KHAI BÁO ERROR_TEMPLATE Ở ĐÂY ĐỂ LINTER KHÔNG BÁO LỖI ──────────────────
ERROR_TEMPLATE = """<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="vi">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>{{ code }} – GUA Maison</title>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,700;0,900;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    body {
      font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif;
      background: #fafaf9;
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 3rem 1rem;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .blob {
      position: fixed; top: 50%; left: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      width: 500px; height: 500px;
      background: #e7e5e4;
      border-radius: 50%;
      filter: blur(100px);
      pointer-events: none; z-index: 0;
    }
    .card {
      position: relative; z-index: 10;
      width: 100%; max-width: 620px;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
      backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
      border: 1px solid rgba(231,229,228,0.7);
      border-radius: 1.5rem;
      padding: clamp(2.5rem, 6vw, 5rem);
      text-align: center;
      box-shadow: 0 20px 60px -15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
      animation: revealUp .7s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1) forwards;
      opacity: 0;
    }
    @keyframes revealUp {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(28px); }
      to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .icon-wrap {
      width: 4rem; height: 4rem;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: #f5f5f4;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      margin: 0 auto 1.5rem;
      color: #a8a29e;
    }
    .icon-wrap svg { width: 2rem; height: 2rem; }
    .code {
      font-size: clamp(5rem, 18vw, 8rem);
      font-weight: 900;
      line-height: 1;
      letter-spacing: -.04em;
      color: #1c1917;
      margin-bottom: 1rem;
    }

<body>
  <div class="blob" aria-hidden="true"></div>
  <div class="card">
    <div class="icon-wrap" aria-hidden="true">
      {% if code == 404 %}
      <svg fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21 21l-5.197-5.197m0 0A7.5 7.5 0 105.196 5.196a7.5 7.5 0 0010.607 10.607z"/></svg>
      {% elif code in (403, 400, 405) %}
      <svg fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M16.5 10.5V6.75a4.5 4.5 0 10-9 0v3.75m-.75 11.25h10.5a2.25 2.25 0 002.25-2.25v-6.75a2.25 2.25 0 00-2.25-2.25H6.75a2.25 2.25 0 00-2.25 2.25v6.75a2.25 2.25 0 002.25 2.25z"/></svg>
      {% elif code == 413 %}
      <svg fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3 16.5v2.25A2.25 2.25 0 005.25 21h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0021 18.75V16.5m-13.5-9L12 3m0 0l4.5 4.5M12 3v13.5"/></svg>
      {% else %}
      <svg fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 9v2m0 4h.01m-6.938 4h13.856c1.54 0 2.502-1.667 1.732-3L13.732 4c-.77-1.333-2.694-1.333-3.464 0L3.34 16c-.77 1.333.192 3 1.732 3z"/></svg>
      {% endif %}
    </div>

    <p class="code">{{ code }}</p>
    <h1 class="title">{{ title }}</h1>
    <p class="desc">{{ desc }}</p>

    <a href="/" class="btn-home">Trở về Trang chủ</a>

    {% if show_debug and code == 500 %}
    <a href="/debug/test-db" class="btn-debug">Chạy trình kiểm tra CSDL</a>
    {% endif %}
  </div>
</body>
</html>"""


def create_app() -> Flask:
    # ĐỔI TÊN BIẾN THÀNH flask_app ĐỂ IDE KHÔNG BỊ NHẦM
    flask_app = Flask(__name__, template_folder="templates", static_folder="static")

    # 1. Validate & Load Config
    validate_config()
    flask_app.config.from_object(get_config())
    flask_app.config["BASE_URL"] = os.environ.get("BASE_URL", "")
    # 2. Extensions
    csrf.init_app(flask_app)

    # 3. Blueprints
    from app.controllers.auth_controller                               import auth_bp
    from app.controllers.product_controller                            import products_bp
    from app.controllers.cart_controller                               import cart_bp
    from app.controllers.admin                                         import admin_bp
    from app.controllers.profile_controller                            import profile_bp
    from app.controllers.chat_controller                               import chat_bp
    from app.controllers.ai_controller                                 import ai_bp
    from app.controllers.favorite_controller                           import favorite_bp
    from app.controllers.payment_controller                            import payment_bp
    from app.controllers.admin.admin_shipping_controller               import admin_shipping_bp
    from app.controllers.admin.admin_shipping_providers_controller     import admin_providers_bp
    from app.controllers.promotions_controller                         import promotions_bp
    from app.controllers.analytics_controller                          import analytics_bp
    try:
        import app.controllers.admin.settings
    except ImportError as e:
        logger.warning(f"Chưa load được settings controller: {e}")

    for bp in [
        auth_bp, products_bp, cart_bp, admin_bp,
        profile_bp, chat_bp, ai_bp, favorite_bp, payment_bp,
        admin_shipping_bp, admin_providers_bp, promotions_bp, analytics_bp
    ]:
        flask_app.register_blueprint(bp)

    if flask_app.config.get("DEBUG"):
        from app.controllers.debug_controller import debug_bp
        flask_app.register_blueprint(debug_bp)
        logger.info("🛠️  Debug blueprint đã được kích hoạt (Development only).")

    # 4. Context Processor
    @flask_app.context_processor
    def inject_globals() -> dict:
        cart_count = 0
        categories = []
        pending_returns = 0
        system_settings = {}
        
        user_id = session.get("user_id")
        role = session.get("role")

        try:
            system_settings = SettingModel.get_settings()
        except Exception:
            logger.warning("context_processor: Lỗi khi lấy system_settings.")

        if user_id:
            try:
                cart_count = CartModel.get_count(user_id)
            except Exception:
                pass

        try:
            categories = CategoryModel.get_all()
        except Exception:
            pass

        if role == "admin":
            try:
                from app.utils.supabase_client import get_supabase
                r = (
                    get_supabase()
                    .table("return_requests")
                    .select("id", count="exact")
                    .eq("status", "pending")
                    .execute()
                )
                pending_returns = r.count or 0
            except Exception:
                pass

        return {
            "current_user": {
                "id": user_id,
                "email": session.get("email"),
                "full_name": session.get("full_name"),
                "role": role,
            },
            "cart_count": cart_count,
            "global_categories": categories,
            "pending_returns": pending_returns,
            "system_settings": system_settings,
        }

    # 5. Error Handlers
    def _error_response(code: int, title: str, desc: str):
        show_debug = flask_app.config.get("DEBUG", False)
        return render_template_string(
            ERROR_TEMPLATE, code=code, title=title, desc=desc,
            show_debug=show_debug
        ), code

    @flask_app.errorhandler(400)
    def bad_request(_e):
        return _error_response(400, "Yêu cầu không hợp lệ", "Dữ liệu gửi lên bị lỗi hoặc không đúng định dạng.")

    @flask_app.errorhandler(403)
    def forbidden(_e):
        return _error_response(403, "Từ chối truy cập", "Bạn không có quyền truy cập vào trang này.")

    @flask_app.errorhandler(CSRFError)
    def handle_csrf_error(_e):
        return _error_response(403, "Phiên bảo mật hết hạn", "Token bảo mật đã hết hạn. Vui lòng tải lại trang và thử lại.")

    @flask_app.errorhandler(404)
    def not_found(_e):
        return _error_response(404, "Không tìm thấy trang", "Đường dẫn này không tồn tại hoặc đã bị gỡ khỏi hệ thống GUA Maison.")

    @flask_app.errorhandler(405)
    def method_not_allowed(_e):
        return _error_response(405, "Phương thức không được phép", "Hành động này không được hỗ trợ trên endpoint hiện tại.")

    @flask_app.errorhandler(413)
    def request_too_large(_e):
        return _error_response(413, "File quá lớn", "Kích thước file vượt quá giới hạn 10 MB. Vui lòng chọn ảnh nhỏ hơn.")

    @flask_app.errorhandler(500)
    def server_error(_e):
        logger.exception("Internal Server Error")
        return _error_response(500, "Lỗi máy chủ", "Hệ thống đang gặp sự cố kỹ thuật. Đội ngũ kỹ sư đang xử lý.")

    return flask_app
</file>

              {% endif %}
              {% if p.gender and p.gender != 'unisex' %}
                <span class="px-2 py-0.5 text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-stone-600 bg-stone-100 border border-stone-200 rounded-md">{{ 'Nam' if p.gender == 'men' else 'Nữ' }}</span>
              {% endif %}
            </div>
          </td>
          {# ── Cột Barcode ── #}
          <td class="px-6 py-4">
            {% if p.barcode %}
            <button
              onclick="showBarcodePopup(this, '{{ p.barcode }}')"
              class="group flex flex-col items-start gap-1.5 text-left">
              <div class="bc-inline w-[140px] bg-white rounded border border-stone-200 p-1">
                <svg class="bc-svg-mini" data-barcode="{{ p.barcode }}"></svg>
              </div>
              <span class="font-mono text-[10px] font-bold text-stone-500 tracking-wider group-hover:text-stone-900 transition-colors">
                {{ p.barcode }}
              </span>
            </button>
            {% else %}
            <span class="text-[10px] text-stone-300 font-bold">—</span>
            {% endif %}
          </td>
          <td class="px-6 py-4">
            <span class="px-3 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-stone-600 bg-stone-100 border border-stone-200 rounded-lg">
              {{ p.categories.name if p.categories else '—' }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td class="px-6 py-4">
            <div class="font-bold text-stone-900 text-[15px]">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(p.price) }} <span class="text-[11px] font-medium text-stone-400">₫</span></div>
          </td>
          <td class="px-6 py-4 text-center">
            <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg border text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest {{ sk_cls }}">
              <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full {{ dot_cls }}"></span>{{ sk_lbl }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td class="px-6 py-4 text-center">
            {% if p.deleted_at %}
              <span class="inline-block px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg border border-stone-200 bg-stone-100 text-stone-400 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest line-through">Đã xóa</span>
            {% elif p.is_active %}
              <span class="inline-block px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg border border-stone-300 bg-white text-stone-900 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest shadow-sm">Đang bán</span>

              <span class="inline-block px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg border border-stone-200 bg-stone-50 text-stone-500 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest">Tạm ẩn</span>
            {% endif %}
          </td>
          <td class="px-6 py-4">
            <div class="flex items-center justify-end gap-2">

                <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" d="M13.5 6H5.25A2.25 2.25 0 003 8.25v10.5A2.25 2.25 0 005.25 21h10.5A2.25 2.25 0 0018 18.75V10.5m-10.5 6L21 3m0 0h-5.25M21 3v5.25"/></svg>

                    onsubmit="return confirm('Chuyển sản phẩm vào thùng rác?\n(Các đơn hàng cũ không bị ảnh hưởng)')">

                <button type="submit" class="w-9 h-9 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-stone-200 text-stone-400 hover:text-rose-600 hover:border-rose-600 hover:bg-rose-50 transition-all" title="Xóa">
                  <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" d="M14.74 9l-.34 12m-4.72 0l-.34-12M4.5 6.375h15m-15 0A2.25 2.25 0 005.25 9h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0021 6.375m-15 0V4.5a2.25 2.25 0 012.25-2.25h4.5A2.25 2.25 0 0116.5 4.5v1.875"/></svg>
                </button>
              </form>
              {% endif %}
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
        {% else %}
        <tr>
          <td colspan="8" class="px-6 py-20 text-center">
            <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4">
              <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-stone-100 flex items-center justify-center text-stone-400">
                <svg class="w-8 h-8" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" d="M20.25 7.5l-.625 10.632a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.247 2.118H6.622a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.247-2.118L3.75 7.5M10 11.25h4M3.375 7.5h17.25c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125v-1.5c0-.621-.504-1.125-1.125-1.125H3.375c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v1.5c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125z"/></svg>
              </div>
              <p class="text-sm font-bold text-stone-500">Chưa có sản phẩm nào.</p>
              <a href="{{ url_for('admin.add_product') }}" class="text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-stone-900 border-b border-stone-900 pb-0.5">Tạo sản phẩm mới</a>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
        {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>
</div>

      <span class="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-stone-900 text-white text-sm font-bold shadow-md">{{ pg }}</span>
    {% elif pg == 1 or pg == total_pages or (pg >= page-2 and pg <= page+2) %}
      <a href="{{ url_for('admin.products', page=pg, q=current_q, status=current_status) }}" 
         class="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-stone-200 bg-white text-stone-600 text-sm font-bold hover:text-stone-900 hover:border-stone-900 transition-colors shadow-sm">
        {{ pg }}
      </a>
    {% elif pg == page-3 or pg == page+3 %}
      <span class="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center text-stone-400 font-bold">…</span>
    {% endif %}
  {% endfor %}
  
  {% if page < total_pages %}
  <a href="{{ url_for('admin.products', page=page+1, q=current_q, status=current_status) }}" 
     class="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-stone-200 bg-white text-stone-500 hover:text-stone-900 hover:border-stone-900 transition-colors shadow-sm">
    <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M8.25 4.5l7.5 7.5-7.5 7.5"/></svg>
  </a>
  {% endif %}
</div>

{% block extra_scripts %}
{# ── BARCODE POPUP OVERLAY ── #}
<div id="barcode-popup" class="barcode-popup" role="tooltip">
  <div class="bc-brand">GUA Maison</div>
  <svg id="bc-popup-svg"></svg>
  <div class="bc-label" id="bc-popup-label"></div>
  <div class="bc-actions">
    <button class="bc-btn" onclick="copyBarcode()">Copy mã</button>
    <button class="bc-btn print" onclick="printBarcode()">In barcode</button>
  </div>
</div>

{# Hidden print area #}
<div id="barcode-print-area" style="display:none;">
  <div style="text-align:center; font-family:'Courier New',monospace; padding:24px;">
    <div style="font-size:11px; font-weight:900; letter-spacing:0.2em; color:#78716c; margin-bottom:8px;">GUA MAISON</div>
    <svg id="bc-print-svg"></svg>
    <div style="font-size:13px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.12em; margin-top:8px;" id="bc-print-label"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// Logic chuyển đổi chế độ xem Grid/Table bằng Tailwind classes
function setView(v) {
  const t = document.getElementById('view-table'), g = document.getElementById('view-grid');
  const bt = document.getElementById('btn-table'), bg = document.getElementById('btn-grid');
  
  if (v === 'grid') {
    t.classList.add('hidden');
    g.classList.remove('hidden');
    
    bg.classList.add('bg-stone-900', 'text-white', 'shadow-md');
    bg.classList.remove('text-stone-400');
    
    bt.classList.remove('bg-stone-900', 'text-white', 'shadow-md');
    bt.classList.add('text-stone-400');
  } else {
    g.classList.add('hidden');
    t.classList.remove('hidden');
    
    bt.classList.add('bg-stone-900', 'text-white', 'shadow-md');
    bt.classList.remove('text-stone-400');
    
    bg.classList.remove('bg-stone-900', 'text-white', 'shadow-md');
    bg.classList.add('text-stone-400');
  }
  localStorage.setItem('productView', v);
}

// Khôi phục view người dùng đã chọn trước đó
if (localStorage.getItem('productView') === 'grid') {
  setView('grid');
} else {
  setView('table'); // Default
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  BARCODE ENGINE
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
let _currentBarcode = '';
const popup = document.getElementById('barcode-popup');

/** Render tất cả mini barcode SVG inline khi trang load */
function renderAllMiniBarcodes() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.bc-svg-mini[data-barcode]').forEach(svg => {
    const code = svg.getAttribute('data-barcode');
    if (!code) return;
    try {
      JsBarcode(svg, code, {
        format:      'CODE128',
        width:       1.4,
        height:      32,
        displayValue: false,
        margin:      2,
        background:  'transparent',
        lineColor:   '#1c1917',
      });
    } catch(e) { svg.closest('.bc-inline')?.remove(); }
  });
}

/** Hiển thị popup barcode lớn khi click */
function showBarcodePopup(triggerEl, code) {
  _currentBarcode = code;

  // Render barcode vào popup
  const svgEl = document.getElementById('bc-popup-svg');
  try {
    JsBarcode(svgEl, code, {
      format:      'CODE128',
      width:       2,
      height:      60,
      displayValue: false,
      margin:      4,
      background:  '#ffffff',
      lineColor:   '#1c1917',
    });
  } catch(e) { return; }

  document.getElementById('bc-popup-label').textContent = code;

  // Định vị popup gần trigger
  const rect = triggerEl.getBoundingClientRect();
  popup.style.display = 'block';
  popup.style.opacity = '0';

  // Tính toán vị trí để popup không ra ngoài màn hình
  const pw = popup.offsetWidth  || 240;
  const ph = popup.offsetHeight || 160;
  const gap = 8;

  let top  = rect.bottom + gap;
  let left = rect.left;

  // Nếu popup tràn xuống dưới → hiện lên trên
  if (top + ph > window.innerHeight - 16) {
    top = rect.top - ph - gap;
  }
  // Nếu popup tràn sang phải → căn phải
  if (left + pw > window.innerWidth - 16) {
    left = window.innerWidth - pw - 16;
  }
  if (left < 8) left = 8;

  popup.style.top  = top  + 'px';
  popup.style.left = left + 'px';
  popup.classList.add('visible');
  popup.style.opacity = '1';
  popup.style.pointerEvents = 'all';
}

/** Đóng popup */
function closeBarcodePopup() {
  popup.classList.remove('visible');
  popup.style.display = 'none';
  popup.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
}

/** Copy mã vào clipboard */
function copyBarcode() {
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(_currentBarcode).then(() => {
    const btn = popup.querySelector('.bc-btn:not(.print)');
    const orig = btn.textContent;
    btn.textContent = '✓ Đã copy!';
    setTimeout(() => btn.textContent = orig, 1500);
  }).catch(() => {});
}

/** In barcode */
function printBarcode() {
  const printSvg   = document.getElementById('bc-print-svg');
  const printLabel = document.getElementById('bc-print-label');
  try {
    JsBarcode(printSvg, _currentBarcode, {
      format:      'CODE128',
      width:       3,
      height:      80,
      displayValue: true,
      text:        _currentBarcode,
      fontSize:    14,
      margin:      8,
      background:  '#ffffff',
      lineColor:   '#000000',
    });
  } catch(e) { return; }
  printLabel.textContent = _currentBarcode;

  const area = document.getElementById('barcode-print-area');
  area.style.display = 'flex';
  window.print();
  area.style.display = 'none';
}

// Đóng popup khi click ra ngoài
document.addEventListener('click', e => {
  if (!popup.contains(e.target) && !e.target.closest('[onclick*="showBarcodePopup"]')) {
    closeBarcodePopup();
  }
});

// Đóng popup khi scroll
window.addEventListener('scroll', closeBarcodePopup, { passive: true });

// Render tất cả mini barcode khi DOM sẵn sàng
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', renderAllMiniBarcodes);
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

    .no-print { display: none !important; }
    .print-box { box-shadow: none !important; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5 !important; page-break-inside: avoid; }
  }
  .no-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
  .no-scrollbar { -ms-overflow-style: none; scrollbar-width: none; }
</style>

{% block content %}
<div class="min-h-screen bg-[#f8f8f8] pb-12 font-sans selection:bg-black selection:text-white">

  <div class="bg-white border-b border-neutral-200 sticky top-16 z-30 shadow-sm no-print">
    <div class="max-w-[1400px] mx-auto px-4 md:px-6 py-4 flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-4">

<script id="chart-data" type="application/json">
{
  "monthly": {{ stats.monthly | tojson | safe if stats else '[]' }},
  "channel": {{ report.channel_revenue | tojson | safe if report.channel_revenue else '{}' }}
}
</script>

<script>
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  MODULE: BÁO CÁO (CHART.JS) - ĐÃ CẬP NHẬT MÀU K-FASHION
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  let data = { monthly: [], channel: {} };
  try { data = JSON.parse(document.getElementById('chart-data').textContent); } catch (e) {}

  Chart.defaults.font.family = "'Inter', sans-serif";
  Chart.defaults.color = '#a3a3a3'; // neutral-400

  // 1. Chart Tỉ trọng kênh (Pie Chart)
  const channelLabels = Object.keys(data.channel).map(k => k.toUpperCase());
  if (channelLabels.length > 0 && document.getElementById('channelPieChart')) {
    new Chart(document.getElementById('channelPieChart'), {
      type: 'doughnut',
      data: {
        labels: channelLabels,
        datasets: [{
          data: Object.values(data.channel),
          // Bảng màu Minimalist: Đen, Xám đậm, Xám nhạt...
          backgroundColor: ['#000000', '#525252', '#a3a3a3', '#d4d4d4', '#e5e5e5'].slice(0, channelLabels.length),
          borderWidth: 2, 
          borderColor: '#ffffff',
          hoverOffset: 4
        }]
      },
      options: {
        responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false, cutout: '75%',
        plugins: {
          legend: { position: 'bottom', labels: { usePointStyle: true, padding: 20, font: { size: 10, weight: 'bold' } } },
          tooltip: { padding: 12, cornerRadius: 2, backgroundColor: '#000', callbacks: { label: ctx => ' ' + ctx.raw.toLocaleString('vi-VN') + ' ₫' } }
        }
      }
    });
  }

  // 2. Chart Tăng trưởng theo tháng (Bar Chart)
  if (data.monthly && data.monthly.length > 0 && document.getElementById('monthlyRevenueChart')) {
    new Chart(document.getElementById('monthlyRevenueChart'), {
      type: 'bar',
      data: {
        labels: data.monthly.map(d => d.month),
        datasets: [{
          label: 'Doanh thu', 
          data: data.monthly.map(d => d.revenue),
          backgroundColor: '#000000', 
          hoverBackgroundColor: '#525252',
          borderRadius: 2, // Đổi bo góc cột thành vuông sắc cạnh
          barThickness: 'flex', 
          maxBarThickness: 40
        }]
      },
      options: {
        responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
        plugins: {
          legend: { display: false },
          tooltip: { backgroundColor: '#000000', cornerRadius: 2, padding: 12, callbacks: { label: ctx => ' ' + ctx.raw.toLocaleString('vi-VN') + ' ₫' } }
        },
        scales: {
          y: { border: { display: false }, grid: { color: '#f5f5f5', drawTicks: false }, ticks: { callback: v => (v / 1000000) + ' Tr', padding: 10, font: {size: 10} } },
          x: { border: { display: false }, grid: { display: false }, ticks: { font: { weight: 'bold', size: 10 } } }
        }
      }
    });
  }
});
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

            <div class="h-px bg-neutral-100 mx-4 my-1"></div>
            {% endif %}
            <a href="/profile/" class="block px-6 py-3 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-neutral-500 hover:text-black hover:bg-neutral-50 transition-colors">Tài khoản</a>
            <a href="/profile/orders" class="block px-6 py-3 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-neutral-500 hover:text-black hover:bg-neutral-50 transition-colors">Đơn hàng</a>
            <div class="h-px bg-neutral-100 mx-4 my-1"></div>
            <form action="/auth/logout" method="POST" class="m-0">
              <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
              <button type="submit" class="w-full text-left px-6 py-3 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-red-500 hover:bg-red-50 transition-colors cursor-pointer">
                Đăng xuất
              </button>
            </form>
          </div>
        </div>
        {% endif %}
      </div>

      {# Giỏ hàng #}
      <a href="/cart/" aria-label="Giỏ hàng" class="relative hover:opacity-60 transition-opacity p-1.5 -mr-1.5">
        <svg class="w-4 h-4 md:w-[18px] md:h-[18px]" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15.75 10.5V6a3.75 3.75 0 10-7.5 0v4.5m11.356-1.993l1.263 12c.07.665-.45 1.243-1.119 1.243H4.25a1.125 1.125 0 01-1.12-1.243l1.264-12A1.125 1.125 0 015.513 7.5h12.974c.576 0 1.059.435 1.119 1.007zM8.625 10.5a.375.375 0 11-.75 0 .375.375 0 01.75 0z"/></svg>
        {% if cart_count > 0 %}
        <span class="absolute top-0 right-0 bg-red-500 text-white text-[8px] font-black w-3.5 h-3.5 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white">
          {{ cart_count }}

{# ── LOGIC ĐỔI MÀU NAVBAR KHI CUỘN ── #}
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    const nav = document.getElementById('mainNav');
    
    // Logic đổi màu Header
    const updateNavTheme = () => {
      // Nếu ở trang chủ VÀ chưa cuộn quá 50px -> Header trong suốt, chữ trắng
      if (window.location.pathname === "/" && window.scrollY <= 50) {
        nav.classList.add('bg-transparent', 'text-white', 'border-transparent');
        nav.classList.remove('bg-white/95', 'backdrop-blur-md', 'text-black', 'border-neutral-100');
      } else {
        // Cuộn xuống hoặc ở trang khác -> Header nền trắng, chữ đen
        nav.classList.remove('bg-transparent', 'text-white', 'border-transparent');
        nav.classList.add('bg-white/95', 'backdrop-blur-md', 'text-black', 'border-neutral-100');
      }
    };

    // Chạy ngay khi vừa load trang
    updateNavTheme();
    // Chạy mỗi khi cuộn
    window.addEventListener('scroll', updateNavTheme, { passive: true });
  });
</script>
</file>

  {# ══ 7. NEWSLETTER CTA ══ #}
  {% include 'components/home/_cta_register.html' ignore missing %}

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    const container = document.getElementById('slider-container');
    const progressBar = document.getElementById('progressBar');
    const btnNext = document.getElementById('btnNext');
    const btnPrev = document.getElementById('btnPrev');

    if (!container) return;

    // 1. Đồng bộ Progress Bar & Nút
    const updateUI = () => {
        const maxScroll = container.scrollWidth - container.clientWidth;
        if (maxScroll <= 0) {
            progressBar.style.width = '100%';
            btnPrev.disabled = true;
            btnNext.disabled = true;
            return;
        }
        const scrollProgress = (container.scrollLeft / maxScroll) * 100;
        progressBar.style.width = scrollProgress + '%';
        
        btnPrev.disabled = container.scrollLeft <= 5;
        btnNext.disabled = container.scrollLeft >= maxScroll - 5;
    };

    container.addEventListener('scroll', updateUI, { passive: true });
    setTimeout(updateUI, 100);
    window.addEventListener('resize', updateUI);

    // 2. Logic Nút Điều Hướng (Cuộn bằng CSS Smooth)
    const getScrollStep = () => {
        const item = container.querySelector('.slider-item');
        return item ? item.offsetWidth + 24 : container.clientWidth * 0.5;
    };

    btnNext.addEventListener('click', () => {
        container.scrollBy({ left: getScrollStep(), behavior: 'smooth' });
    });

    btnPrev.addEventListener('click', () => {
        container.scrollBy({ left: -getScrollStep(), behavior: 'smooth' });
    });

    // 3. Logic Drag To Scroll
    let isDown = false;
    let startX;
    let scrollLeft;
    let isDragging = false;

    container.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
        isDown = true;
        isDragging = false;
        container.classList.remove('scroll-smooth');
        container.style.cursor = 'grabbing';
        startX = e.pageX - container.offsetLeft;
        scrollLeft = container.scrollLeft;
    });

    window.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
        isDown = false;
        container.style.cursor = 'auto';
        container.classList.add('scroll-smooth');
        if(isDragging) {
            const step = getScrollStep();
            const snapPoint = Math.round(container.scrollLeft / step) * step;
            container.scrollTo({ left: snapPoint, behavior: 'smooth' });
        }
        setTimeout(() => { isDragging = false; }, 50);
    });

    container.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
        if (!isDown) return;
        e.preventDefault();
        const x = e.pageX - container.offsetLeft;
        const walk = (x - startX) * 1.5;
        if (Math.abs(walk) > 5) isDragging = true;
        container.scrollLeft = scrollLeft - walk;
    });

    // Chống Click nhầm khi đang vuốt kéo Slider
    const clickableElements = container.querySelectorAll('a, button');
    clickableElements.forEach(el => {
        el.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (isDragging) {
                e.preventDefault();
                e.stopPropagation();
            }
        });
    });
});
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

{% block extra_scripts %}
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{
  const cards=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.product-card'));
  const spinner=document.getElementById('scroll-spinner');
  const pag=document.getElementById('pagination-block');
  let vis=10;const step=10;

  /* Restore saved favs */
  const saved=getSavedFavs();
  document.querySelectorAll('.fb').forEach(b=>{if(saved.includes(String(b.dataset.productId)))b.classList.add('is-fav');});

  if(cards.length<=vis){if(pag)pag.classList.remove('hidden');return;}

  const io=new IntersectionObserver(e=>{
    if(!e[0].isIntersecting)return;
    io.unobserve(e[0].target);
    if(spinner)spinner.classList.add('visible');
    setTimeout(()=>{
      const batch=cards.slice(vis,vis+step);
      batch.forEach(c=>{c.classList.remove('hidden-product');c.classList.add('animate-fade-in-up');});
      vis+=batch.length;
      if(spinner)spinner.classList.remove('visible');
      if(vis>=cards.length){if(pag)pag.classList.remove('hidden');}
      else{io.observe(cards[vis-1]);}
    },800);
  },{rootMargin:'150px'});
  io.observe(cards[vis-1]);
});

function getSavedFavs(){try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('gua_favs')||'[]');}catch{return[];}}
function setSavedFavs(l){try{localStorage.setItem('gua_favs',JSON.stringify(l));}catch{}}
function showToast(m){const t=document.getElementById('fav-toast');if(!t)return;t.textContent=m;t.classList.add('show');clearTimeout(t._t);t._t=setTimeout(()=>t.classList.remove('show'),2200);}

async function toggleFav(btn){
  const pid=String(btn.dataset.productId||'');if(!pid)return;
  const was=btn.classList.contains('is-fav');
  btn.classList.toggle('is-fav');btn.classList.add('pop');
  btn.addEventListener('animationend',()=>btn.classList.remove('pop'),{once:true});
  const favs=getSavedFavs();
  if(!was){if(!favs.includes(pid))favs.push(pid);}else{const i=favs.indexOf(pid);if(i>-1)favs.splice(i,1);}
  setSavedFavs(favs);
  const _csrf=(document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')||{}).content||'';
  const h={'Content-Type':'application/json','X-CSRFToken':_csrf};
  try{
    const r=await fetch('/api/favorites/toggle',{method:'POST',headers:h,credentials:'same-origin',body:JSON.stringify({product_id:pid})});
    if(r.status===401){btn.classList.toggle('is-fav');showToast('Vui lòng đăng nhập để lưu yêu thích');return;}
    if(r.status===403){btn.classList.toggle('is-fav');showToast('Phiên hết hạn, vui lòng tải lại trang');return;}
    if(!r.ok)throw new Error();
    showToast(btn.classList.contains('is-fav')?'Đã thêm vào yêu thích ♥':'Đã bỏ yêu thích');
  }catch{btn.classList.toggle('is-fav');showToast('Không thể kết nối, thử lại sau');}
}
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="vi">

  <title>{% block title %}{{ system_settings.general.shop_name or 'GUA Maison' }}{% endblock %}</title>
  <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="{{ url_for('static', filename='images/favicon.png') }}">

  {# ── FONTS: Cormorant (display) + DM Sans (body) ── #}

  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">

  <style>
    /* ════════════════════════════════════════
       GUA DESIGN TOKENS — nguồn sự thật duy nhất
       Dùng var() thay vì hardcode màu ở mọi trang

    :root {
      --header-h:    68px;        /* Navbar height — JS sẽ overwrite */

      --gua-shadow-lg: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.08), 0 16px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.08);
    }

    /* ── Base ── */
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; }

      font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;

      -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;

    }

    /* ── Lenis smooth scroll ── */
    html.lenis, html.lenis body { height: auto; }
    .lenis.lenis-smooth         { scroll-behavior: auto !important; }
    .lenis.lenis-smooth [data-lenis-prevent] { overscroll-behavior: contain; }
    .lenis.lenis-stopped        { overflow: hidden; }

    /* ── Scrollbar (hidden globally, preserved for specific containers) ── */
    ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 0; height: 0; }
    .no-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
    .no-scrollbar { -ms-overflow-style: none; scrollbar-width: none; }

    /* ── Scroll reveal (used by all pages) ── */
    .reveal {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(20px);
      transition: opacity .9s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1), transform .9s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);
      will-change: transform, opacity;
    }
    .reveal.active { opacity: 1; transform: none; }

    /* ── GUA Profile system classes (shared across profile/* pages) ── */
    .gua-card {
      background: #fff;
      border: 1px solid var(--gua-muted);

    }

    .gua-reveal { opacity: 0; animation: guaUp .55s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) forwards; }
    .gua-d1 { animation-delay: .05s; }
    .gua-d2 { animation-delay: .12s; }
    .gua-d3 { animation-delay: .20s; }

  <script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {

    // ── 1. Đo navbar thực tế → set --header-h ──────────────────────────
    const navbar = document.querySelector('nav, header, [data-navbar]');
    if (navbar) {
      const setH = () => document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--header-h', navbar.offsetHeight + 'px');
      setH();
      new ResizeObserver(setH).observe(navbar);
    }

    // ── 2. Mobile menu ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
    const openBtn = document.getElementById('openMenu');
    const closeBtn = document.getElementById('closeMenu');
    const menu    = document.getElementById('mobileMenu');
    if (openBtn && closeBtn && menu) {
      const toggle = (show) => {
        menu.classList.toggle('invisible', !show);
        menu.classList.toggle('opacity-0', !show);
        menu.classList.toggle('opacity-100', show);
        openBtn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', show);
        document.body.style.overflow = show ? 'hidden' : '';
      };
      openBtn.addEventListener('click',  () => toggle(true));
      closeBtn.addEventListener('click', () => toggle(false));
    }

    // ── 3. Scroll reveal ────────────────────────────────────────────────
    const io = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
      entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('active'); io.unobserve(e.target); } });
    }, { threshold: 0.08 });
    document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => io.observe(el));
  });

  // ── CSRF helper ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  function getCSRFToken() {
    return document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.getAttribute('content') || '';
  }

  // ── Analytics helper ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  function trackEvent(data) {
    return fetch('/api/analytics/track', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-CSRFToken': getCSRFToken() },
      body: JSON.stringify(data)
    }).catch(() => {});
  }

  // ── Toast ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  let _toastWrap = null;
  function showToast(msg, isWarning = false) {
    if (!_toastWrap) {
      _toastWrap = Object.assign(document.createElement('div'), {
        className: 'fixed bottom-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-[9999] flex flex-col gap-2 pointer-events-none'
      });
      document.body.appendChild(_toastWrap);
    }
    const t = Object.assign(document.createElement('div'), {
      className: 'bg-white text-black px-6 py-3 flex items-center gap-3 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest shadow-lg border border-neutral-200 transition-all duration-300 translate-y-4 opacity-0 pointer-events-auto rounded-sm',
      innerHTML: `<span>${msg}</span>`
    });
    _toastWrap.appendChild(t);
    requestAnimationFrame(() => t.classList.remove('translate-y-4', 'opacity-0'));
    setTimeout(() => { t.classList.add('opacity-0', 'translate-y-4'); setTimeout(() => t.remove(), 300); }, 2500);
  }

  // ── Wishlist toggle ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  async function toggleHeart(productId, btn) {
    if (window.event) window.event.preventDefault();
    const icon = btn.querySelector('.heart-icon');
    try {
      const res = await fetch('/api/favorites/toggle', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-CSRFToken': getCSRFToken() },
        body: JSON.stringify({ product_id: productId })
      });
      if (res.status === 401) { showToast('Vui lòng đăng nhập', true); setTimeout(() => location.href = '/auth/login', 1400); return; }
      const data = await res.json();
      if (data.status === 'success') {
        trackEvent({ product_id: productId, event_type: 'wishlist' });
        const added = data.action === 'added';
        icon?.classList.toggle('text-neutral-300', !added);
        icon?.classList.toggle('text-black', added);
        icon?.classList.toggle('fill-black', added);
        showToast(added ? 'Đã thêm vào yêu thích' : 'Đã xóa khỏi yêu thích', !added);
      }
    } catch { showToast('Lỗi kết nối', true); }
  }

  // ── Lenis smooth scroll ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const lenis = new Lenis({ duration: 1.2, easing: t => Math.min(1, 1.001 - Math.pow(2, -10 * t)) });
  (function raf(t) { lenis.raf(t); requestAnimationFrame(raf); })(0);
  </script>

  {% block extra_scripts %}{% endblock %}
</body>
</html>
</file>

</files>
